customblocker.name: Message from Dredmor
customblocker.description: Dear adventurer, I hope you're reading this closely. I know things can get tough in this dear dungeon of mine, so I've provided a handy solution - if you ever get bored of life, feel horribly alone or happen to be cornered by my underlings wth no way out, feel free to take this pill and end it all. It's rather painless, I assure you, and it'll save the both of us so much trouble. Just take the pill, walk towards the light, and you'll wake up in a better place, as if nothing had happened...

customblocker.name: Smelter, Mold-form
customblocker.description: This smelter definitely wasn't used on any kind of ore you know of.

customblocker.name: Smelter, Furnace
customblocker.description: This smelter definitely wasn't used on any kind of ore you know of.

customblocker.name: Skeleton
customblocker.description: The bones on this skeleton are thick and sturdy. Given the equipment about you, you guess that this is the smith who worked here.

customblocker.name: Rusty Trough
customblocker.description: The remains of an old water trough, used for quenching hot metal.

customblocker.name: Unsettling Painting
customblocker.description: Just looking at this painting of a sword gives you the chills. The gem in the middle of the sword - it appears to be looking back at you with a sort of menacing humour, the sort that a shark might give to a small fish just before gobbling it up.

customblocker.name: Unsettling Painting
customblocker.description: Just looking at this painting of a sword gives you the chills. The gem in the middle of the sword - it appears to be looking back at you with a sort of menacing humour, the sort that a shark might give to a small fish just before gobbling it up.

customblocker.name: Old Scratchings
customblocker.description: 'How many days has that undead fiend kept me slaving in this place? He has the magics to recreate the damned sword, yet not the strength of arm to beat out the imperfections in the blade - if it were anyone else, if the damnable thing could be used for any other purpose, I would have leapt at the chance, but...'

customblocker.name: Old Scratchings
customblocker.description: 'Though it is bitter much of the time, the demon in the painting is at least some form of company. Our fates are now clear - Dredmor intends to work me to death and beyond as his pet grandmaster smith, and the demon...well, it will suffer a fate worse than me, bound into the sword. I feel sorry for the creature - I will die and my spirit freed even if Dredmor raises my body, but the demon's imprisonment is eternal.'

customblocker.name: Old Scratchings
customblocker.description: 'Dredmor comes in every day to inspect my work; he grows impatient. I try to slow progress as much as possible without raising his suspicon; but it really is a shame to do this to such a wonderful material. Arcadion - for that is the demon's name - has proposed a plan to enact my certain death, without the chance that I can be raised to continue work on the damnable blade. This might be my chance.'

customblocker.name: Old Scratchings
customblocker.description: 'Arcadion's plan is clear: although he is imprisoned within the painting, he has kept hidden from Dredmor the fact that he can still exert a small amount of power - enough to char and ruin my corpse beyond all hope of reanimation. Small amounts of Mud Wen grow on the floor below; they should be enough to brew a potent poison. I must find some excuse to be allowed down there...Dredmor must not be allowed to possess the weapon he seeks to forge.'

customblocker.name: Force Field
customblocker.description: A magical barrier bars your path.

customblocker.name: Sign
customblocker.description: Solve the puzzle, adventurer, and access the fount of knowledge. Steel thy mind and be prepared.

customblocker.name: Sign
customblocker.description: An island is populated by Knights and Knaves. Knights always tell the truth, whereas Knaves always lie. One day, you visit the island and meet two of the islanders, Jack and Jill. Each of them is either a Knight or a Knave, although you don't know which. You ask, and Jack says: 'either Jill's a Knight OR I'm a Knave.'

customblocker.name: Sign
customblocker.description: What canst thou conclude? Is Jack a a) Knave, b) Knight, or c) is it impossible to tell? The levers correspond to the answers from left to right; pull the one thou thinks is the answer. But be forewarned: thou hast only one chance to give thy answer.

customblocker.name: Hint
customblocker.description: If thou art having difficulties, adventurer, consider each possibility. Can either one lead you to a contradiction?

action.text: You are utterly...wrong!
You are utterly...wrong!
You are utterly...right!

pedestal.name: Inscription
pedestal.text: You have proven your worth; take this mirror of our power.

customblocker.name: Barred Door
customblocker.description: A reinforced saferoom door, possibly against the results of the lab's experiments.

action.text: With a horrible screech, the caged monsters transform and burst from their prisons!

customblocker.name: Rough Scratchings
customblocker.description: They do not realise I am growing in more than one way. Soon...

customblocker.name: Rough Scratchings
customblocker.description: I am constantly hungry. I devour all that they will feed me, but the pain never ceases.

customblocker.name: Rough Scratchings
customblocker.description: They made me touch all sorts of stones today. I do not understand why...

customblocker.name: Rough Scratchings
customblocker.description: What is this thing they are doing to us? This 'evolution'?

customblocker.name: Rough Scratchings
customblocker.description: These words appear to have been written in blood and are largely illegible.

customblocker.name: Weapon Rack
customblocker.description: This weapon rack has numerous scratches on it.

customblocker.name: Weapon Rack
customblocker.description: A bloodstained armour rack.

customblocker.name: Evolutionary Chart
customblocker.description: It's a chart listing various magical theories on evolution.

pedestal.name: Research Log
pedestal.text: Day four: The initial experiments go well. Dredmor has, through various intermediaries, purchased a good amount of equipment. Major tests are poised to commence soon.

customblocker.name: Old Desk
customblocker.description: An old writing desk.

customblocker.name: Shelves
customblocker.description: Mostly filled with junk, although there may be something useful left.

customblocker.name: Specimen Pen Bars
customblocker.description: These sturdy bars keep the specimens from chewing your head off.

action.text: With a horrible screech, the caged monsters transform and burst from their prisons!

customblocker.name: Rough Scratchings
customblocker.description: I-I can't...

customblocker.name: Rough Scratchings
customblocker.description: Flame! Death! DESTRUCTION!

customblocker.name: Rough Scratchings
customblocker.description: WHY? WHY?

customblocker.name: Rough Scratchings
customblocker.description: I heard them call me a failure, but I can feel it. I'm just not changing on the outside...

customblocker.name: Rough Scratchings
customblocker.description: BETTER SAFE THAN SORRY BETTER SAFE THAN SORRY BETTER SAFE THAN SORRY BETTER SAFE THAN SORRY BETTER SAFE THAN SORRY

customblocker.name: Weapon Rack
customblocker.description: Too bad the last occupant of this room didn't get to use these weapons.

customblocker.name: Weapon Rack
customblocker.description: This rack appears to have been used as a table at some point.

customblocker.name: Note from Martha
customblocker.description: Have you seen Mittens, Andrea? I can't help but keep wringing my flippers in worry; it's not like that kitten to vanish without a trace.

pedestal.name: Research Log
pedestal.text: Day seven: A man from our supplier arrived today to help us install the new equipment. He seems a nice enough chap and quite cute too; I wonder if I'll be seeing him again.

customblocker.name: Rough Scratchings
customblocker.description: You see rows upon rows of confounding mathematical equations scratched into the wall.

customblocker.name: Rough Scratchings
customblocker.description: We've formulated a bid for freedom, but we need a willing sacrifice...

customblocker.name: Rough Scratchings
customblocker.description: I'll feed your souls to Hakkar himself!

customblocker.name: Rough Scratchings
customblocker.description: Serpents, serpents everywhere-in my food, hanging from the ceiling, winding through the bars, serp

customblocker.name: Rough Scratchings
customblocker.description: I can hear them clawing at the door. I know that they want; I have sinned enough against them, and will go out to make what small repayment I can in blood.

customblocker.name: Weapon Rack
customblocker.description: This rack seems untouched.

customblocker.name: Weapon Rack
customblocker.description: Use only in case of emergency.

customblocker.name: Dosing Schedule
customblocker.description: 'Control group: nothing. Group A: rare candies only. Group B: powdered water stones and rare candies to 50%, made up with placebo...'the rest is illegible.

pedestal.name: Research Log
pedestal.text: Day nine: Oh my gosh! I'm so glad I got that guy's number; I called him up and it was really embarassing for me to ask him to take me out, but he said yes! Oh my gosh!

customblocker.name: Old Desk
customblocker.description: An old writing desk.

customblocker.name: Shelves
customblocker.description: Mostly filled with junk, although there may be something useful left.

action.text: With a horrible screech, the caged monsters transform and burst from their prisons!

customblocker.name: Rough Scratchings
customblocker.description: If I ever get out of here, I will drink their blood.

customblocker.name: Rough Scratchings
customblocker.description: Watching...waiting...we don't tire, we don't sleep...

customblocker.name: Rough Scratchings
customblocker.description: Madness is the only solace in this benighted place.

customblocker.name: Rough Scratchings
customblocker.description: Man, I could really do with a Jill Sandwich right about now.

customblocker.name: Weapon Rack
customblocker.description: An old wooden rack. Seems like someone gnawed on this a bit in an attempt to get sustenance out of the wood.

customblocker.name: Weapon Rack
customblocker.description: An armour rack, surrounded by strips of chewed leather.

customblocker.name: Notice
customblocker.description: To everyone in the project: please be reminded that control of all specimens involved is of the highest importance. Wear your protective equipment before handling them.

pedestal.name: Research Log
pedestal.text: Day fifteen: We've had a minor mishap today: one of the specimens struggled loose and ran around for a bit until we could properly contain it. No lasting damage done, though, only our pride.

customblocker.name: Old Desk
customblocker.description: An old writing desk, decorated with bits of dried bacon rind.

customblocker.name: Shelves
customblocker.description: Mostly filled with junk, although there may be something useful left.

customblocker.description: These sturdy bars keep the specimens from chewing your head off.

action.text: With a horrible screech, the caged monsters transform and burst from their prisons!

customblocker.name: Rough Scratchings
customblocker.description: -I will rape them with a thunderbolt-If I ever get out of here-I will soar on the wings of their pyres-

customblocker.name: Rough Scratchings
customblocker.description: You can't make out most of this, only some random scribbles about some 'Darkrai' creature.

customblocker.name: Rough Scratchings
customblocker.description: IIIII IIIII IIIII IIIII IIIII II.

customblocker.name: Rough Scratchings
customblocker.description: To anyone who reads this: let it be known that I regret participating in this crossover attempt.

customblocker.name: Weapon Rack
customblocker.description: There are a few empty spots on this weapon rack. Someone evidently intended to put up a fight.

customblocker.name: Weapon Rack
customblocker.description: A sign is affixed to the rack: 'for emergencies only.'

customblocker.name: Biohazard Warning
customblocker.description: Good working practices are a requirement of continued employment in Dredmor Labs. Dispose of all biological waste in the provided evisceration chutes.

pedestal.name: Research Log
pedestal.text: Day twenty-two: Today, Andrea accused me of not feeding the specimens, making them too aggressive to safely handle, even remotely. I did, though, and two helpings of ground meat at that. What gives?

customblocker.name: Old Desk
customblocker.description: Seems like someone drank a lot of coffee here.

customblocker.name: Shelves
customblocker.description: Mostly filled with junk and old magazines, although there may be something useful left.

customblocker.name: Specimen Pen Bars
customblocker.description: These sturdy bars keep the specimens from chewing your head off.

customblocker.name: Barred Door
customblocker.description: A reinforced saferoom door, possibly against the results of the lab's experiments.

action.text: With a horrible screech, the caged monsters transform and burst from their prisons!

customblocker.name: Rough Scratchings
customblocker.description: Hehehe. Fools...

customblocker.name: Rough Scratchings
customblocker.description: I cannot see myself, but I know I've changed. There are things rippling under my skin now...

customblocker.name: Rough Scratchings
customblocker.description: This specimen has kept a faithful count of its days in imprisonment.

customblocker.name: Rough Scratchings
customblocker.description: Why are you doing this to me? I thought we were friends!

customblocker.name: Rough Scratchings
customblocker.description: And now I lay myself to rest-I can but hope for the best-if I should die before I wake-my soul is Lord Dredmor's to take.

customblocker.name: Weapon Rack
customblocker.description: Seems like they didn't make it here in time.

customblocker.name: Weapon Rack
customblocker.description: An armour rack, surrounded by strips of chewed leather.

customblocker.name: Notice
customblocker.description: Wear your respirator at all times. Noncompliance will be punished by a stint in the naughty corner.

pedestal.name: Research Log
pedestal.text: Day twenty-five: The specimens continue to grow more aggressive; Lord Dredmor will be pleased. Nick was taken sick today; I hope I can get today's work done in time for my dinner date.

customblocker.name: Old Desk
customblocker.description: An old writing desk.

customblocker.name: Shelves
customblocker.description: Mostly filled with junk, although there may be something useful left.

action.text: With a horrible screech, the caged monsters transform and burst from their prisons!

customblocker.name: Rough Scratchings
customblocker.description: I feel so sick, so weak, but incredibly strong in a way I cannot describe...

customblocker.name: Rough Scratchings
customblocker.description: They don't know yet, but sometimes...I think...I've started to glow...

customblocker.name: Rough Scratchings
customblocker.description: To whomever follows me after my body gives: play along with them. Complacency creeps into their actions by the day.

customblocker.name: Rough Scratchings
customblocker.description: Never more shall I...

customblocker.name: Bloody Scrawl
customblocker.description: WE HAVE SOWN THE SEEDS AND NOW REAP THE HARVEST.

customblocker.name: Weapon Rack
customblocker.description: This rack was freshly installed.

customblocker.name: Weapon Rack
customblocker.description: There are still bloodstains on this wooden rack. Seems like it was converted with leather bindings to hold specimens in place.

customblocker.name: Notice
customblocker.description: Today's schedule: Lunch - Nick. Testing - Andrea. Cleanup - Wilco. Results - everyone.

pedestal.name: Research Log
pedestal.text: Day twenty-seven: The dinner date was so amazing! He was so cute and so gentlemanly and with that team surcoat of his...ooh, but I'm getting ahead of myself. We're really shorthanded with Nick not around.

customblocker.name: Old Desk
customblocker.description: Bits of old sandwiches litter this desk. Seems like whoever held out here was willing to starve to death instead of eat them.

customblocker.name: Shelves
customblocker.description: Mostly filled with junk and heaps of old rocks, although there may be something useful left.

customblocker.name: Specimen Pen Bars
customblocker.description: These sturdy bars keep the specimens from chewing your head off.

customblocker.name: Barred Door
customblocker.description: A reinforced saferoom door, possibly against the results of the lab's experiments.

action.text: With a horrible screech, the caged monsters transform and burst from their prisons!

customblocker.name: Rough Scratchings
customblocker.description: I know what they're injecting us with. Growth hormones. It has to be, it's the only explanation for what happened...

customblocker.name: Rough Scratchings
customblocker.description: They only THINK they're the masters here.

customblocker.name: Rough Scratchings
customblocker.description: I AM NOT A MONSTER I AM NOT A MONSTER I AM NOT A MONSTER I AM NOT A MONSTER I AM NOT A MONSTER I AM NOT A MONSTER

customblocker.name: Rough Scratchings
customblocker.description: THE URGES CANNOT BE DENIED

customblocker.name: Bloody Scrawl
customblocker.description: 'Lord Dredmor, please help. I don't want to die. I'm not about to be beaten by these damned vampir -' the writing leaves off in a bloody trail.

customblocker.name: Weapon Rack
customblocker.description: This wooden rack has been mostly taken apart. Seems like someone intended to barricade themselves inside.

customblocker.name: Weapon Rack
customblocker.description: The ends of this rack have been lopped off and sharpened into stakes. You didn't think they were creating vampires here.

customblocker.name: Danger!
customblocker.description: All laboratories are on level three alert as of today. Report suspicious activity of any sort to your supervisor immediately.

pedestal.name: Research Log
pedestal.text: Day twenty-nine: I went to visit Nick on level seven today. He doesn't seem like he's going to make it - the quarantine team came and took him away.

customblocker.name: Old Desk
customblocker.description: Several sharpened pencil stubs lie on the desk.

customblocker.name: Shelves
customblocker.description: Mostly filled with thaumic tables, although there may be something useful left.

action.text: With a horrible screech, the caged monsters transform and burst from their prisons!

customblocker.name: Rough Scratchings
customblocker.description: The plan is coming to fruition. Soon we will be free to wreak our vengeance.

customblocker.name: Rough Scratchings
customblocker.description: They're starting to panic, as they should.

customblocker.name: Rough Scratchings
customblocker.description: 'He hehe ho ha hee ha he ho ho ho' - the writing devolves into gibberish here.

customblocker.name: Rough Scratchings
customblocker.description: When I get out of here, I'm going to mate. I feel so...broody is the only way to put it, and incredibly so...

customblocker.name: Bloody Scrawl
customblocker.description: Dredmor, they're breeding, how are we ever going to containnnnnnn

customblocker.name: Weapon Rack
customblocker.description: The base of this wooden rack is covered with some sort of strange slime.

customblocker.name: Weapon Rack
customblocker.description: One of the legs on this rack has been ripped off.

customblocker.name: Danger!
customblocker.description: All laboratories are now under lockdown. Tresspassing without proper authorisation is punishable by immediate execution.

pedestal.name: Research Log
pedestal.text: Day thirty-three: This is going to be my last entry; I hear the quarantine team coming for me now. To be honest, I feel so sick I'm glad to see them. To whoever is reading this - all I can say is, save yourself.

customblocker.name: Old Desk
customblocker.description: 'I REGRET EVERYTHING' is scrawled in blood on the desk's surface.

customblocker.name: Shelves
customblocker.description: Some sort of meaty moss covers the base of these shelves, but it isn't going to stop you from looting them, is it?

customblocker.name: Smoking Rack
customblocker.description: This rack is slightly charred.

customblocker.name: Smoking Rack
customblocker.description: The wood here has absorbed many meaty fragrances over the years.

customblocker.name: Notice
customblocker.description: Zombys: please scrub the pickling barrel after you're done pickling brains. - Yours sincerely, the Sickly Diggles

customblocker.name: Pickling Barrel
customblocker.description: A strong, vinegary smell wafts from this barrel. You definitely don't want to break this.

customblocker.name: Smoking Rack
customblocker.description: This rack positively stinks.

customblocker.name: Smoking Rack
customblocker.description: Ugh, what's this white stuff clinging to the wood?

customblocker.name: Notice
customblocker.description: By order of the Grand Master of All Things Bad, revealing the secret of Lutofu to outsiders is punishable by death.

customblocker.name: Pickling Barrel
customblocker.description: They're making Lutofu here! The fiends!

customblocker.name: Makeshift Whiteboard
customblocker.description: These poor kids can't even afford proper classroom supplies. Either that, or they're more interested in the practical aspect of education.

customblocker.name: Makeshift Whiteboard
customblocker.description: The kids here are being taught how to distil their enemies into booze by touch alone.

customblocker.name: Makeshift Whiteboard

customblocker.name: Grading Report
customblocker.description: Rareified Horse Meat: A+. Has grasped the idea of touch fermentation very well.

customblocker.name: Grading Report
customblocker.description: Lukas: B+. Being a teetotaller has limited the scope of his works, but he understands the concepts.

customblocker.name: Grading Report
customblocker.description: Aqua: B. Not bad. No comment.

customblocker.name: Grading Report
customblocker.description: Yarrr: B. Grog is not the be-all-end-all of distilling.

customblocker.name: Grading Report
customblocker.description: Zork: C+. Might make assembly-line distiller someday.

customblocker.name: Shelves
customblocker.description: There's a how-to on making sewer brew from - so THAT's how the stuff's really made. Huh, and you had no idea.

customblocker.name: Mini-Still
customblocker.description: Just the right size for children to operate well.

customblocker.name: Makeshift Whiteboard
customblocker.description: 'Coping with my new existence as Dredmor's undead minion: I am special.' Pfffft, yeah, right. If ALL these undead are special, doesn't that mean none of them are? And don't tell me that of all these dead, not one of them was a loser? Actually, considering they died, doesn't that make them ALL losers?

customblocker.description: Though my new life with Dredmor, I am a gift to this world.

customblocker.name: Poster
customblocker.description: I understand that my desire for brains is causing my destructive behaviour and will take steps to consume them in moderation.

customblocker.name: Poster
customblocker.description: With faith in Dredmor, I get better every day.

customblocker.name: Poster
customblocker.description: I can achieve anything I dream of, so long as I believe in Dredmor and his dark geometry.

customblocker.name: Poster
customblocker.description: With Dredmor at my side, I am a sure success.

customblocker.name: Makeshift Whiteboard
customblocker.description: Adventurer Parmigiana. Serves 4, 10 minute preparation, 55 minute cooking time. Two tablespoons olive oil, one small onion, finely chopped, 2 cloves garlic, crushed, 200g fairywodger, quartered, 1 large Carrotty, diced, 500g tomatoes, chopped, 15g fresh basil, roughly torn, 4 skinless adventurer breast fillets, 2 tablespoons grated cheese.

customblocker.name: Makeshift Whiteboard
customblocker.description: Preheat the over to 190 degrees celsius. Heat the oil in a deep frying pan, add the onion and garlic and cook, stirring, for 2 minutes over medium heat. Add fairywodger and cook until lightly browned, stirring frequently. Stir in Carrotty, cook for 2 minutes, then add tomatoes and stir over medium-high heat for 2 minutes. Reduce heat and simmer for 15 minutes until thick, then add basil and season.

customblocker.name: Makeshift Whiteboard
customblocker.description: Arrange the adventurer breasts in a single layer in a deep, ovenproof baking or casserole dish and spoon the sauce over the top. Cover and bake for 25 minutes or until meat is thoroughly cooked. Towards the end of the cooking time, preheat the grill. Uncover the meat and sprinkle the grated cheese over the top of the dish. Put the dish under the grill until the cheese is melted and bubbling. Serve.

loot.subtype: My Little Anvil Junior Smithing Kit

customblocker.name: Makeshift Whiteboard
customblocker.description: 'In order to make a good wand, you'll first need some proper wood. Apply some enchanting oil to the palm of your hand and steadily work the shaft until it becomes stiff and turgid; you don't want your wand to fail you in a dangerous and climactic situation. Once that's done, continue with broad, steady strokes while incanting the words of power...'

customblocker.name: Makeshift Whiteboard
customblocker.description: '...and you're done charging your wand. Don't forget to clean up the resultant ectoplasmic mess, especially if any's gotten onto you. That's basic hygiene. Always dispose of the paper towel you use in a proper thaumahazardous waste container, or at least, where no one can find it.'

customblocker.name: Grading Report
customblocker.description: Biggus: A+. Long, thick, and every one throbbing and pulsing with power - this young man shows promise as a crafter of mighty wands.

customblocker.name: Grading Report
customblocker.description: Vael: A-. Very single-minded. Please remember specialisation is for insects and assembly-line workers.

customblocker.name: Grading Report
customblocker.description: Zer'gulugog: D. Technically she did complete the assignment, but hacking off one of your own limbs for use in a school project is not appropriate behaviour.

customblocker.name: Grading Report
customblocker.description: Larry Potter: C+. Satisfactory, although there are some...disturbing implications. Recommend counselling.

customblocker.name: Grading Report
customblocker.description: Limpus: F. Will never satisfy anyone with this sort of effort, let alone me.

customblocker.name: Shelves
customblocker.description: Advertisments for wandcrafting gels, lubricants and suspicious enhancers fill these shelves.

customblocker.name: Shelves
customblocker.description: 'Increase your magical potency by as much as three times with our brand new pill! Get your power up faster! Last Longer! Stun your associates with just how much raw power you can discharge in one go!'

customblocker.name: Shelves
customblocker.description: 'Magic turning dull for you? That dark, handsome - and above all, forbidden - grimoire in the library's restricted section look tempting as opposed to your faithful spellbook? Mistress Gytha will guide you, young sorceress, through seven easy steps to rekindle your love of the arcane!'

customblocker.name: Waste Bin
customblocker.description: A waste bin. It's pretty full.

customblocker.name: Library Records
customblocker.description: Given how children tend to misplace, eat, or otherwise ruin books, it's little wonder the diggles keep meticulous records.

customblocker.name: Notice
customblocker.description: No eating, drinking, playing, or tunnelling in the library.

customblocker.name: Notice
customblocker.description: Please keep the books in good condition so you can share them with your friends.

customblocker.name: Library Counter
customblocker.description: Stained with ink, glue and the heady scent of picture books.

customblocker.name: Reading Table
customblocker.description: There are crayon marks on this table. How do the diglets even hold them with those flippers?

customblocker.name: Reading Table
customblocker.description: There are crayon marks on this table. How do the diglets even hold them with those flippers?

customblocker.name: Library Shelf
customblocker.description: There's a 'my first dead hero' picture book on these shelves.

customblocker.name: Library Shelf
customblocker.description: There are several colouring books tucked away in these shelves. I mean, why, really? Colouring books in a library - that sort of defeats the point.

customblocker.name: Library Shelf
customblocker.description: It's full of kid-friendly propoganda. Dredmor sure likes to start them off while they're young.

customblocker.name: Library Shelf
customblocker.description: The books in this bookshelf are of the 'see the hero run' variety.

customblocker.name: Signpost
customblocker.description: Welcome to the Diggle Digglington's Children's Library! Have a fun time here!

pedestal.text: Picture Books.

customblocker.name: Library Records
customblocker.description: The Diggle Commandos keep careful track of all restricted books in their possession.

customblocker.name: Notice
customblocker.description: Silence in the library at all times.

customblocker.name: Notice
customblocker.description: By order of Commando High Command, all books in the library are strictly for reference only. No borrowing is allowed.

customblocker.name: Commando Mural
customblocker.description: The inscription under the mural reads 'Who dares, digs.' The Diggle Commando Library was opened in honour of the famed commando Digbo, and many a commando-in-training spends their time here learning to effectively neutralise eyebrowed adventurers.

customblocker.name: Commando Mural
customblocker.description: The inscription under the mural reads 'Who dares, digs.' The Diggle Commando Library was opened in honour of the famed commando Digbo, and many a commando-in-training spends their time here learning to effectively neutralise eyebrowed adventurers.

customblocker.name: Reading Table
customblocker.description: You feel a shift in the air about the table. Best not sit down, lest there be a studious diggle commando there.

customblocker.name: Reading Table
customblocker.description: You feel a shift in the air about the table. Best not sit down, lest there be a studious diggle commando there.

customblocker.name: Library Shelf
customblocker.description: It's full of restricted books which would land you in a prison on short notice.

customblocker.name: Library Shelf
customblocker.description: There's a manual on making bee-bomb arrows in here.

customblocker.name: Library Shelf
customblocker.description: The shelves are crammed full of treatises on poisons and antidotes.

customblocker.name: Library Shelf
customblocker.description: There don't seem to be any books in this shelf - but knowing the diggle commandos, you can never be sure.

customblocker.name: Signpost
customblocker.description: Present your authorisation at the counter before entering.

customblocker.name: Library Records
customblocker.description: All sorts of food crumbs litter this shelf.

customblocker.name: Notice
customblocker.description: We may starve to death here, lost and forgotten, but the books shall be protected.

customblocker.name: Notice
customblocker.description: Hungry diggle needs food badly.

customblocker.name: Library Counter
customblocker.description: Seems like the counter's been gnawed in places.

customblocker.name: Reading Table
customblocker.description: Stale crumbs litter the base of this reading table.

customblocker.name: Reading Table
customblocker.description: Stale crumbs litter the base of this reading table.

customblocker.name: Library Shelf
customblocker.description: This one's full of Dire Gourmand magazines. Someone's vandalised one of the pages depicting an all-you-can-eat buffet.

customblocker.name: Library Shelf
customblocker.description: 'Burning witches at the stake - a fun barbeque event for the whole family.'

customblocker.name: Library Shelf
customblocker.description: A volume catches your eye - 'the delicacies of the Elder Beings.'

customblocker.name: Library Shelf
customblocker.description: It's a cookbook. Adventurer spaghetti, baked offal balls, anatomical charts for use in butchery, and so forth. Creepy.

customblocker.name: Signpost
customblocker.description: I think we've been abandoned and forgotten about...please help! Will catalogue for food!

pedestal.name: Cataloguing Index
pedestal.text: So hungry...

action.text: The librarians swarm in to stop your theft!
The librarians swarm in to stop your theft!
Silence in the library!

customblocker.name: Library Records
customblocker.description: Careful records are made of who comes and goes in this sensitive archive. Seems like Dredmor's been here a lot of late.

customblocker.name: Notice
customblocker.description: Silence in the library at all times.

customblocker.name: Notice
customblocker.description: Theft is a crime, and book theft a particularly henious one. You wouldn't want to be sitting next to a book thief, would you?

customblocker.name: Classic Painting
customblocker.description: Sir Flannegan's masterpiece, 'Surprised Unicorn', was painted during his early period as an artist and is generally considered one of the more reliable likenesses of these elusive creatures. Many theories have been put forward, but no one is quite sure why the unicorn in the picture is suprised.

customblocker.name: Classic Painting
customblocker.description: Sir Flannegan's masterpiece, 'Surprised Unicorn', was painted during his early period as an artist and is generally considered one of the more reliable likenesses of these elusive creatures. Many theories have been put forward, but no one is quite sure why the unicorn in the picture is suprised.

customblocker.name: Reading Table
customblocker.description: There are marks in the wood here. Seems like an arch diggle or two got overenthusiastic when reading.

customblocker.name: Reading Table
customblocker.description: There are marks in the wood here. Seems like an arch diggle or two got overenthusiastic when reading.

customblocker.name: Library Shelf
customblocker.description: It's a book on the storyline of the Dungeons of Dredmor. Unsurprisingly, many of the pages are blank.

customblocker.name: Library Shelf
customblocker.description: This one's full of geological specimens and treatises.

customblocker.name: Library Shelf
customblocker.description: There are charts of weather patterns on the shelves, and records of particularly bad weather years.

customblocker.name: Library Shelf
customblocker.description: These shelves seem to have been recently cleaned out by a distinctly bony hand.

customblocker.name: Signpost
customblocker.description: There is knowledge in here all right, but do you really want it?

pedestal.name: Cataloguing Index
pedestal.text: Artifacts of Power.

pedestal.name: Cataloguing Index
pedestal.text: More Artifacts of Power.

pedestal.name: Cataloguing Index
pedestal.text: Even MORE Artifacts of Power. I mean, really, what were you expecting?

pedestal.name: Cataloguing Index
pedestal.text: The Null Collection - treatises by the great code-wizard Null.

customblocker.description: Loans, returns, missing books, late returns, fines, accounts - you didn't know diggles could be such...librarians.

customblocker.description: Silence in the library at all times.

customblocker.name: Notice
customblocker.description: Please don't steal or damage the books; leave them for all to enjoy. Thank you. - The Diggle Digglington Senior Library Staff.

customblocker.name: Library Shelf
customblocker.description: It's crammed full of encyclopedia volumes.

customblocker.name: Library Shelf
customblocker.description: This shelf is filled with wizardly biographies.

customblocker.name: Library Shelf
customblocker.description: You didn't know diggles did philosophy.

customblocker.name: Library Shelf
customblocker.description: How-to books on blowing stuff up in all fashions are stacked here.

customblocker.name: Signpost
customblocker.description: Patrons should check in at the counter before using the library's facilities.

customblocker.name: Shrine to Obsidia
customblocker.description: This shrine is dedicated to Obsidia, daughter of the dragon god of earth and one of the draconic pantheon's lesser deities. Note her expression, the pinprick of her pupils, her teeth that even the mural's bright colours can't get to look friendly - she must be a nice young lady.

customblocker.name: Shrine to Obsidia
customblocker.description: This shrine is dedicated to Obsidia, daughter of the dragon god of earth and one of the draconic pantheon's lesser deities. Note her expression, the pinprick of her pupils, her teeth that even the mural's bright colours can't get to look friendly - she must be a nice young lady.

customblocker.name: Offerings Altar
customblocker.description: The dragons faithfully place their offerings here.

customblocker.name: Offerings Altar
customblocker.description: The dragons faithfully place their offerings here.

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: These candles are covered in runes depicting the draconic deities.

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: 'My daughter hasn't passed a single exam of late, Goddess. I worry for her future...'

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: These prayer candles have been lit for so long that the wax has melted through and through. At least it's a less bloody way of sending prayers than what the Church of Demonology does.

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: The prayers on these candles are not addressed to Obsidia herself, but to her father. You remember hearing it's rather standard practice amongst dragons to do that, since His name is not to be spoken.

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: 'And She said to the ailing: come, warm yourslves in my fire and let your ailments fall away like old scales...'

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: 'Goddess, I make this offering as thanks for even having the chance to apply for a position at...'

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: '...For those who would demean her will face the full force of Her birthright - the fury of the earth itself.'

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: These candles have draconic symbols of fertility and abundance etched into their wax.

action.text: You hear what sounds like anguished sobbing in the distance, and the shrine erupts in flames!

customblocker.name: Shrine to Obsidia
customblocker.description: This shrine is dedicated to Obsidia, daughter of the dragon god of earth and one of the draconic pantheon's lesser deities. Note her expression, the pinprick of her pupils, her teeth that even the mural's bright colours can't get to look friendly - she must be a nice young lady.

customblocker.name: Shrine to Obsidia
customblocker.description: This shrine is dedicated to Obsidia, daughter of the dragon god of earth and one of the draconic pantheon's lesser deities. Note her expression, the pinprick of her pupils, her teeth that even the mural's bright colours can't get to look friendly - she must be a nice young lady.

customblocker.name: Offerings Altar
customblocker.description: The dragons faithfully place their offerings here.

customblocker.name: Offerings Altar
customblocker.description: The dragons faithfully place their offerings here.

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: These candles have a fragrant herbal scent to them.

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: Small, sweet berries have been placed alongside these candles.

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: 'Bless us, Mother, that our harvest may be plentiful and that we shall not want...'

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: These prayers are from a certain Dray'gon, requesting for more friends in the dungeon to play with.

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: 'Mother, I really hate having to eat ground meat while everyone else eats grown-up food. Mommy says I can join in when I'm older, but when is that?'

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: 'Goddess, we give thanks for our light and our lives, for the warmth of your body...'

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: These particular candles don't seem to be made out of wax.

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: '...I shall try again today, Goddess. If I fail, my soul is yours...

action.text: You hear what sounds like anguished sobbing in the distance, and the shrine erupts in flames!

customblocker.name: Shrine to Obsidia
customblocker.description: This shrine is dedicated to Obsidia, daughter of the dragon god of earth and one of the draconic pantheon's lesser deities. Note her expression, the pinprick of her pupils, her teeth that even the mural's bright colours can't get to look friendly - she must be a nice young lady.

customblocker.name: Shrine to Obsidia
customblocker.description: This shrine is dedicated to Obsidia, daughter of the dragon god of earth and one of the draconic pantheon's lesser deities. Note her expression, the pinprick of her pupils, her teeth that even the mural's bright colours can't get to look friendly - she must be a nice young lady.

customblocker.name: Offerings Altar
customblocker.description: The dragons faithfully place their offerings here.

customblocker.name: Offerings Altar
customblocker.description: The dragons faithfully place their offerings here.

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: The prayers on these candles have been etched in old draconic and are foreign to you.

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: The prayers on these candles have been etched in old draconic and are foreign to you.

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: 'Obsidia, mother of us all, we beg a boon of you. Help our friends the diggles; they have been struggling of late and it pains us to see them...'

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: 'My mate is so gravid she can scarcely rise from the nest, let alone fly. Goddess, I ask for your favour in hunting...'

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: '...We shall not fear, we shall not want...'

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: 'Her father is the lord of the land and the earth is his body and domain, but it is she who brings forth life from it...'

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: 'Goddess, I give thanks, not for anything in particular but for the miracle of still being alive.'

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: '...From the ashes rise new growth, and that is the way of the land.'

action.text: You hear what sounds like anguished sobbing in the distance, and the shrine erupts in flames!

customblocker.name: Shrine to Obsidia
customblocker.description: This shrine is dedicated to Obsidia, daughter of the dragon god of earth and one of the draconic pantheon's lesser deities. Note her expression, the pinprick of her pupils, her teeth that even the mural's bright colours can't get to look friendly - she must be a nice young lady.

customblocker.name: Shrine to Obsidia
customblocker.description: This shrine is dedicated to Obsidia, daughter of the dragon god of earth and one of the draconic pantheon's lesser deities. Note her expression, the pinprick of her pupils, her teeth that even the mural's bright colours can't get to look friendly - she must be a nice young lady.

customblocker.name: Offerings Altar
customblocker.description: The dragons faithfully place their offerings here.

customblocker.name: Offerings Altar
customblocker.description: The dragons faithfully place their offerings here.

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: These prayer candles have almost completely melted away.

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: Flames flicker feebly on the wicks of these candles.

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: These prayer candles look really old, and there're not that many of them, either. This shrine must not see much use.

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: Hot wax has run over the prayers on these candles, rendering them mostly illegible.

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: The flames on these candles sway in the wind - but the air is completely still. You can't help but feel you're being watched.

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: '...A shield. That was how she ended up, turned into a shield. Goddess, grant me the strength of body and will...'

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: These candles smell of gold, or how gold would smell if it had a scent to it.

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: '...Her eye is sleepless, Her eye watches...'

action.text: You hear what sounds like anguished sobbing in the distance, and the shrine erupts in flames!

customblocker.name: Shrine to Obsidia
customblocker.description: This shrine is dedicated to Obsidia, daughter of the dragon god of earth and one of the draconic pantheon's lesser deities. Note her expression, the pinprick of her pupils, her teeth that even the mural's bright colours can't get to look friendly - she must be a nice young lady.

customblocker.name: Shrine to Obsidia
customblocker.description: This shrine is dedicated to Obsidia, daughter of the dragon god of earth and one of the draconic pantheon's lesser deities. Note her expression, the pinprick of her pupils, her teeth that even the mural's bright colours can't get to look friendly - she must be a nice young lady.

customblocker.name: Offerings Altar
customblocker.description: The dragons faithfully place their offerings here.

customblocker.name: Offerings Altar
customblocker.description: The dragons faithfully place their offerings here.

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: 'Obsidia, we give thanks to you for the peace we have been enjoying.'

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: The prayers on these candles have been etched in old draconic and are foreign to you.

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: 'Goddess, we plead with you to save us from the eyebrowed horrors.'

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: The prayers on these candles have been etched in old draconic and are foreign to you.

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: 'Goddess, please watch over my cousin, Sasenthys. We hear of a plague of adventurers in that part of the world and fear for her.'

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: 'The safe hatching of our wyrmlings brings us hope for the future. Convey our thanks to your father, goddess.

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: '...As the mother watches over her brood and feeds them, so does She guide our paths and bring forth Her father's providence.'

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: 'I beg a miracle, Goddess. My brother is deathly ill...'

action.text: You hear what sounds like anguished sobbing in the distance, and the shrine erupts in flames!

customblocker.name: Shrine to Obsidia
customblocker.description: This shrine is dedicated to Obsidia, daughter of the dragon god of earth and one of the draconic pantheon's lesser deities. Note her expression, the pinprick of her pupils, her teeth that even the mural's bright colours can't get to look friendly - she must be a nice young lady.

customblocker.name: Shrine to Obsidia
customblocker.description: This shrine is dedicated to Obsidia, daughter of the dragon god of earth and one of the draconic pantheon's lesser deities. Note her expression, the pinprick of her pupils, her teeth that even the mural's bright colours can't get to look friendly - she must be a nice young lady.

customblocker.name: Offerings Altar
customblocker.description: The dragons faithfully place their offerings here.

customblocker.name: Offerings Altar
customblocker.description: The dragons faithfully place their offerings here.

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: 'Mother Goddess Obsidia, today my brood and I ventured out of the dungeon for a spring picnic, and the hand of your power was to be seen everywhere...'

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: These candles look to be made of poorer quality wax than the others. Now if only Krong could inspire such devoutness...

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: 'Goddess, my mother was slain by an eyebrowed horror. Grant me the strength of will and body, the strength of the earth to avenge my mother and your fallen child...'

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: 'Goddess, that drake over by the next lava stream - he's a really fine specimen, and I'm sure he's been making eyes at me and I just feel all hot inside when I look at him...'

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: The prayers on these candles mostly depict dragons intertwined about one another and doing unmentionable things.

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: The runes on these candles are in old draconic and make no sense to you.

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: 'Thank you for your miracle, goddess. My brother has recovered and is whole again.'

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: '...and I hope to be able to make my pilgrimage to the mountain next year, Goddess.'

action.text: You hear what sounds like anguished sobbing in the distance, and the shrine erupts in flames!

customblocker.name: Shrine to Obsidia
customblocker.description: This shrine is dedicated to Obsidia, daughter of the dragon god of earth and one of the draconic pantheon's lesser deities. Note her expression, the pinprick of her pupils, her teeth that even the mural's bright colours can't get to look friendly - she must be a nice young lady.

customblocker.name: Shrine to Obsidia
customblocker.description: This shrine is dedicated to Obsidia, daughter of the dragon god of earth and one of the draconic pantheon's lesser deities. Note her expression, the pinprick of her pupils, her teeth that even the mural's bright colours can't get to look friendly - she must be a nice young lady.

customblocker.name: Offerings Altar
customblocker.description: The dragons faithfully place their offerings here.

customblocker.name: Offerings Altar
customblocker.description: The dragons faithfully place their offerings here.

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: '...And being newly mated to Talnoth - I know everyone says it fades with time, but I can't help but feel so happy.'

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: The prayer candles here have been dripped with lava to give them a pleasant - well, to dragons - scent to accompany the prayers.

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: '...Goddess, please help me, I don't know what to do...maybe I'll sell a little of my blood at the blood bank, they pay nicely for certain kinds and even give you a cup of sweet tea and a sugared biscuit. So what if the recipients get mixed up every now and then?'

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: '...I feel so heavy, so hot, so swollen; I'm hungry all the time and can hardly move from the nest, and yet it feels...incredible. Thank you, goddess.'

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: 'I'm thinking about investing my hoard in some property, Goddess, maybe a couple of townhouses through human intermediaries. I shan't ask you for luck, since someone has to lose in this game, but I just want to give my thanks.

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: The runes on these candles are in old draconic and make no sense to you.

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: 'You have triumphed through me, Goddess. Good overcomes evil once again, the land is liberated, the demon is slain. The eyebrowed horror is dead.'

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: The flames here are far hotter than what should be possible for simple candles.

action.text: You hear what sounds like anguished sobbing in the distance, and the shrine erupts in flames!

customblocker.name: Shrine to Obsidia
customblocker.description: Obsidia's visage glares out at you furiously. After all, you don't really have a good reason to be in here, do you?

customblocker.name: Shrine to Obsidia
customblocker.description: Obsidia's visage glares out at you furiously. After all, you don't really have a good reason to be in here, do you?

customblocker.name: Sacred Altar
customblocker.description: Draconic runes honouring the earth are carved into the sides of this altar.

customblocker.name: Sacred Altar
customblocker.description: Draconic runes honouring the earth are carved into the sides of this altar.

customblocker.name: Sacred Flame
customblocker.description: The sacred flames here burn with the fury of both land and life.

customblocker.name: Sacred Flame
customblocker.description: The sacred flames here burn with the fury of both land and life.

customblocker.name: Strange Tree
customblocker.description: This tree is still rich and verdant despite the scorching heat of the shrine.

customblocker.name: Strange Tree
customblocker.description: This tree is still rich and verdant despite the scorching heat of the shrine.

customblocker.name: Warning
customblocker.description: Those who would befoul the sanctity of the Mother's shrine shall know the wrath of flame.

customblocker.name: Warning

customblocker.name: Mural of Obsidia
customblocker.description: It's a startling likeness of Obsidia, the draconic mother goddess and daughter of the dragon god of earth.

customblocker.name: Mural of Obsidia
customblocker.description: It's a startling likeness of Obsidia, the draconic mother goddess and daughter of the dragon god of earth.

customblocker.name: Rune-Inscribed Skull
customblocker.description: '...And in our time of need, the Mother will send to us a chosen one of our kind, one who has no destiny and as such can change the course of fate...'

customblocker.name: Rune-Inscribed Skull
customblocker.description: '...The Eyebrahkiin, the Mother's chosen, who has the ability to slay the Eyebrowed Ones and steal their powers. That one shall be our saviour...'

customblocker.name: Mural of Obsidia
customblocker.description: It's a startling likeness of Obsidia, the draconic mother goddess and daughter of the dragon god of earth.

customblocker.name: Mural of Obsidia
customblocker.description: It's a startling likeness of Obsidia, the draconic mother goddess and daughter of the dragon god of earth.

customblocker.name: Rune-Inscribed Skull
customblocker.description: 'Read, and learn of the power within.'

customblocker.name: Rune-Inscribed Skull
customblocker.description: '...The land has watched all, the land has seen all, and it does not like what it has seen...'

customblocker.name: Tree
customblocker.description: This tree lends a soothing air to the stillness of the ancient library.

customblocker.name: Tree
customblocker.description: This tree lends a soothing air to the stillness of the ancient library.

customblocker.description: Do not stack items you mean to offer to Obsidia - they will lose their consecrated status and the Mother will NOT accept them. To be safe, hold them in your hand all the way to the altar.

customblocker.name: Blessed Tree
customblocker.description: A wonderful fragrance wafts from the blossoms of this tree.

customblocker.name: Blessed Tree
customblocker.description: A wonderful fragrance wafts from the blossoms of this tree.

customblocker.name: Grove Maiden
customblocker.description: The grove maiden (surely a beauty by draconic standards) eyes you warily, then sighs. 'Here, soft-skin. If you want to make an offering to the Mother, pick one of these - remember, She will only accept items that have been properly consecrated.'

customblocker.name: Shrine to Obsidia
customblocker.description: If this is what Obsidia looks like when she's being warm and motherly, you don't want to see Her angry.

customblocker.name: Shrine to Obsidia

customblocker.description: Grown strong on the strength of the earth, this tree is rich and verdant.

customblocker.name: Blessed Tree
customblocker.description: Grown strong on the strength of the earth, this tree is rich and verdant.

customblocker.name: Grove Guardian
customblocker.description: This particular dragon is napping on the job. The grove is so peaceful, you're having trouble staying awake yourself.

customblocker.name: Grove Guardian
customblocker.description: The grove guardian notices you, then lowers its head to let you pass.

customblocker.name: Grove Guardian
customblocker.description: 'Behave yourself while in here,' the guardian says. 'Show some propriety, unlike all your predecessors. You don't want to incur the Mother's wrath.'

customblocker.name: Grove Guardian
customblocker.description: The dragon notices you and snorts. 'Welcome, soft-skin,' it says. 'The Mother's shrines are open only to us, but all creatures may find sanctuary within Her sacred groves.'

customblocker.name: Blessed Tree
customblocker.description: Grown strong on the strength of the earth, this tree is rich and verdant.

customblocker.name: Blessed Tree
customblocker.description: Grown strong on the strength of the earth, this tree is rich and verdant.

customblocker.name: Blessed Tree
customblocker.description: Grown strong on the strength of the earth, this tree is rich and verdant.

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: These candles smell wonderful, perhaps even fruity.

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: A pleasant warmth rises from these candles.

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: The prayers on these candles are etched in old draconic and are illegible to you.

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: '...He has not returned for three days. Mother, give me the strength to what what I must...'

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: Just how do the dragons manage to make these candles without so much as opposable thumbs?

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: The runes on these candles tell of Obsidia's long-standing rivalry with her sister, Selzauide.

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: '...Let us mediate on the Mother's Words of Power today. First, calm your heart and steady thyself...'

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: '...Such is Her power, that where She doth tread the earth bringth forth and each creature doth abundantly breed...'

customblocker.name: Grieving Dragon
customblocker.description: This dragon is sunk deep in grief and is ignoring you.

action.text: You place your offering on the altar, and feel a gentle warmth wash away your burdens.
You place your offering on the altar, and gasp as heat flares in your heart.
You place your offering on the altar, and watch as it vanishes and something else takes its place.

customblocker.name: Blessed Tree
customblocker.description: The soft, spongy wood of this tree allows it to thrive in the swampy environment.

customblocker.name: Blessed Tree
customblocker.description: The soft, spongy wood of this tree allows it to thrive in the swampy environment.

customblocker.name: Grove Maiden
customblocker.description: The grove maiden raises her head to study you. 'A human wanting to make an offering to the Mother? Well, it's generally a good idea to respect all deities, but...' she sniffs the air. 'Don't let my questions bother you. Go on, pick out an offering.'

customblocker.name: Shrine to Obsidia
customblocker.description: If this is what Obsidia looks like when she's being warm and motherly, you don't want to see Her angry.

customblocker.name: Blessed Tree
customblocker.description: Grown strong on the strength of the earth, this tree is rich and verdant.

customblocker.name: Grove Guardian
customblocker.description: The dragon's eyes spin in their sockets. 'The local mudders? Friendly enough bunch, even if they need to take more baths.'

customblocker.name: Grove Guardian
customblocker.description: The grove guardian is rigid and at attention - you wonder if the stories are true, that you can poke them and they're not allowed to move. Best not to try it.

customblocker.name: Grove Guardian
customblocker.description: 'If you see any of the Mother's shrines,' the guardian says, 'best for you to keep out. You wouldn't want us all over your shrines to your human gods, would you?'

customblocker.name: Grove Guardian
customblocker.description: The grove guardian groans. 'Not another eyebrowed one. That's the fifth one this week.'

customblocker.name: Blessed Tree
customblocker.description: Grown strong on the strength of the earth, this tree is rich and verdant.

customblocker.name: Blessed Tree
customblocker.description: Grown strong on the strength of the earth, this tree is rich and verdant.

customblocker.name: Blessed Tree
customblocker.description: Grown strong on the strength of the earth, this tree is rich and verdant.

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: '...Mother, today I embark on a grand journey out of the dungeon. I pray for safe passage to the cold, hard land of...

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: 'The days are almost upon us, Mother. Send us the Eyebrahkiin...'

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: These candles have been coloured green and have a pleasant herbal scent to them.

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: These prayer candles have burned to stubs but are still going strong.

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: The illustrations on these candles tell of the draconic version of the end of the world, when the goddess' father awakens and old life gives way to new.

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: '...The eggs with hatch any day now. Mother, I give thanks; I'm so excited...'

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: '...And the first word of the Mother's power is to call forth Her power of life...'

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: You feel a presence lingering about the candle flame, and hastily draw back.

customblocker.name: Meditating Dragon
customblocker.description: The dragon doesn't turn away from the water, but speaks to you anyway. 'Come, friend. Look out over the water with me, and let us reflect on the grace and strength of the earth.'

action.text: You place your offering on the altar, and feel a gentle warmth wash away your burdens.
You place your offering on the altar, and gasp as heat flares in your heart.
You place your offering on the altar, and watch as it vanishes and something else takes its place.

customblocker.name: Sacred Tree
customblocker.description: Frost drips from the thick, green leaves of this tree.

customblocker.name: Sacred Tree
customblocker.description: Frost drips from the thick, green leaves of this tree.

customblocker.name: Grove Maiden
customblocker.description: The grove maiden here looks askance at you with a chilling glare, then cocks her head towards the offerings. 'Pick one, the cold keeps them fresh longer.'

customblocker.name: Shrine to Obsidia
customblocker.description: If this is what Obsidia looks like when she's being warm and motherly, you don't want to see Her angry.

customblocker.name: Shrine to Obsidia

customblocker.name: Sacred Flame

customblocker.name: Guardian Tree
customblocker.description: The bark of this tree is frozen as solid as the heartwood itself.

customblocker.name: Guardian Tree
customblocker.description: The bark of this tree is frozen as solid as the heartwood itself.

customblocker.name: Guardian Tree
customblocker.description: The bark of this tree is frozen as solid as the heartwood itself.

customblocker.name: Guardian Tree
customblocker.description: The bark of this tree is frozen as solid as the heartwood itself.

customblocker.name: Grove Guardian
customblocker.description: 'It's not so bad, really,' the dragon says with a sigh. 'The Mother's grove is warm enough, but running down to the store for a scale-polisher...it's bothersome, to say the least.'

customblocker.name: Grove Guardian
customblocker.description: As you watch, the grove guardian spits a little blob of fire onto the frozen lake and watches it spit and fizzle on the ice.

customblocker.name: Grove Guardian
customblocker.description: 'Oh. A visitor,' the grove guardian says.'Don't get very many down here, for obvious reasons.'

customblocker.name: Grove Guardian
customblocker.description: The grove guardian eyes you suspiciously. 'Keep your weapons away while in the grove. Humans approaching with their weapons drawn, folk tend to get nervous.'

customblocker.name: Sacred Tree
customblocker.description: The warmth of the earth has nurtured this tree despite the cold.

customblocker.name: Sacred Tree
customblocker.description: The warmth of the earth has nurtured this tree despite the cold.

customblocker.name: Sacred Tree
customblocker.description: The warmth of the earth has nurtured this tree despite the cold.

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: '...Goddess, today I pray for your wisdom in making a decision. I have recently come into the possession of some property, and...'

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: These candles are carefully made from packed tallow.

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: '...And we give our daily thanks for thy bounty, Mother.'

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: These candles flicker in the chill winds that penetrate the grove.

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: '...So it came to pass that the hero Sasenthys stood before the wall of ice and spoke the Mother's words of power. The younger sister's power was no match for the elder's, and the ice shattered...'

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: '...And that was my dream, but I still don't quite understand the message you intended to send me, Mother.'

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: '...That is the third word of power, which symbolises warmth and regrowth. Focus your minds, and let us continue to meditate...'

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: These candles flicker gently in the serenity of the grove.

customblocker.name: Meditating Dragon
customblocker.description: 'This is a good spot to meditate,' the dragon says. 'The harsher the land, the more obvious the Mother's power is made, and the easier it is to see Her glory.'

action.text: You place your offering on the altar, and feel a gentle warmth wash away your burdens.
You place your offering on the altar, and gasp as heat flares in your heart.
You place your offering on the altar, and watch as it vanishes and something else takes its place.

customblocker.name: Sacred Tree
customblocker.description: This tree remains rich and leafy despite the scorching heat about you.

customblocker.name: Sacred Tree
customblocker.description: This tree remains rich and leafy despite the scorching heat about you.

customblocker.name: Grove Maiden
customblocker.description: The grove maiden makes a sign of warding as you approach and mutters something incomprehensible under her breath. 'Pick an offering, but watch your step while in the grove,' she says. 'This one is particularly sacred to us.'

customblocker.name: Shrine to Obsidia
customblocker.description: If this is what Obsidia looks like when she's being warm and motherly, you don't want to see Her angry.

customblocker.name: Shrine to Obsidia

customblocker.description: An altar for you to place offerings to Obsidia. Now, what sort of stuff do you remember the dragons placing on these?

customblocker.name: Sacred Flame

customblocker.name: Guardian Tree
customblocker.description: The bark of this tree looks as solid as steel and probably is, too.

customblocker.name: Guardian Tree
customblocker.description: The bark of this tree looks as solid as steel and probably is, too.

customblocker.name: Guardian Tree
customblocker.description: The bark of this tree looks as solid as steel and probably is, too.

customblocker.name: Guardian Tree
customblocker.description: The bark of this tree looks as solid as steel and probably is, too.

customblocker.name: Grove Guardian
customblocker.description: 'Depending on who you ask, this is either the best job, or it's the worst,' the grove guardian says. 'Me? I think it's the best.'

customblocker.name: Grove Guardian
customblocker.description: 'If it were up to me, I wouldn't let you in at all,' the grove guardian growls. 'Your kind mean bad news. Always.'

customblocker.name: Grove Guardian
customblocker.description: The grove guardian bows its head to let you pass. 'Please don't knock over any prayer candles while you're making your offering. The candles mean a lot to us.'

customblocker.name: Grove Guardian
customblocker.description: This particular grove guardian doesn't seem very friendly or talkative. The scaly, silent sort, eh?

customblocker.name: Sacred Tree
customblocker.description: This tree remains rich and leafy despite the scorching heat about you.

customblocker.name: Sacred Tree
customblocker.description: This tree remains rich and leafy despite the scorching heat about you.

customblocker.name: Sacred Tree
customblocker.description: This tree remains rich and leafy despite the scorching heat about you.

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: 'Goddess, I don't know what to do. Which is better, to do the right thing, or the smart thing?'

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: These candles have gone all runny in the heat of the grove.

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: There are etchings on these candles depicting enormous pillars of ice and what seems like a shrine. What does this all mean?

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: These particular prayer candles are set in holders of polished obsidian. Seems like someone wants to flaunt the size of their hoard.

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: '...Forgotten by all but us, She stirs in her cradle of ice and wind. Waiting, wanting to hear a voice other than Her own...'

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: Yikes! These candles aren't just burning, they're blazing! Why haven't they burnt themselves out yet?

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: Several small and rough gems lie amongst these candles. You can only wonder why they're there.

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: '...Mother, for the gift of your fire we give thanks. For the gift of your strength we give thanks. For the gift of your life we give thanks...'

customblocker.name: Meditating Dragon
customblocker.description: As you watch, this dragon reverently bends its neck down to take a sip from the lava pool, then returns to its meditations.

customblocker.description: The boughs of this tree are rich and lush.

customblocker.name: Verdant Tree

customblocker.name: Grove Maiden
customblocker.description: This particular grove maiden is wearing a veil over her eyes. She says nothing as you approach, but nods and extends a claw towards the offerings.

customblocker.description: If this is what Obsidia looks like when she's being warm and motherly, you don't want to see Her angry.

customblocker.description: This tree's bark is thick and iron-hard.

customblocker.description: This tree's bark is thick and iron-hard.

customblocker.name: Guardian Tree
customblocker.description: This tree's bark is thick and iron-hard.

customblocker.name: Grove Guardian
customblocker.description: 'The grove maiden?' the guardian says. 'Oh, she's taken a vow of silence. Don't worry about her.'

customblocker.name: Grove Guardian
customblocker.description: This particular guardian seems relaxed, especially since it's curled about the tree that marks its post.

customblocker.name: Grove Guardian
customblocker.description: The grove guardian reluctantly lowers its head and lets you pass. 'Don't get too comfortable, soft-skin. If not for the fact that this is the Mother's grove, I'd be on you in a heartbeat. Don't give me a reason to.'

customblocker.name: Grove Guardian
customblocker.description: The dragon grunts. 'Conduct yourself appropriately while in the grove, please. Sometimes I wonder why the Mother even bothers extending her bounty to your kind.'

customblocker.name: Verdant Tree
customblocker.description: Grown strong on the strength of the earth, this tree is rich and verdant.

customblocker.name: Verdant Tree
customblocker.description: Grown strong on the strength of the earth, this tree is rich and verdant.

customblocker.name: Verdant Tree
customblocker.description: Grown strong on the strength of the earth, this tree is rich and verdant.

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: These prayer candles burn with a warm, steady light.

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: '...And the blessed tree bore fruit, and from the fruit came the seeds. 'Let the seeds be scattered,' said the Mother, 'such that all may find peace where they land.' That is why we have the groves today.'

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: Draconic runes of peace and serenity have been etched into these candles.

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: 'I have made my peace with you, Mother. I shall step forward boldly, and face what must come to us all.'

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: '...Of the earth, our bodies are made. With the fire, our hearts beat. On the winds, our wings carry us. With the water, our blood flows. Those are the root of our strength...'

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: You can't make out most of the runes etched into the candle wax, but there is one interesting fact - most of Selzauide's shrines have been lost to time as the goddess lost favour with both Her father and sister. What few remain ought to be very well-hidden.

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: '...Here is the next word of power, which calls the Mother's fury to your side. Let us meditate further...'

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: These prayer candles are set in holders of cut crystal.

customblocker.name: Grove Keeper
customblocker.description: This old dragon is tending to the sacred trees in the grove. 'Take as much fruit as you like, I'll be glad to be rid of it,' it says. 'We give the diggles as much as they want, but there's always some left over and it's a sin to waste the Mother's riches.'

customblocker.description: Small, unripe fruit hangs from the boughs of this tree.

customblocker.name: Grove Maiden
customblocker.description: The grove maiden here is definitely anything but a maiden - her underbelly is immensely gravid with the promise of a huge clutch of eggs. 'Sorry,' she pants. 'Can't quite help you; just take what you want. I don't even have the energy to get around much these days.'
