customblocker.description: This tree's bark is thick and iron-hard.

customblocker.name: Grove Guardian
customblocker.description: 'That's my mate up there,' the dragon growls. 'Don't even THINK of laying a hand on her while she's indisposed.'

customblocker.name: Grove Guardian
customblocker.description: This grove guardian keeps on eyeing the fruit growing on the trees in the grove. You admit they do look good.

customblocker.name: Grove Guardian
customblocker.description: The grove guardian notices you and sighs. 'I used to be an adventurer like you, then I retired. What, you don't think we can be adventurers too?'

customblocker.name: Grove Guardian
customblocker.description: The dragon notices you and snorts. 'This is a place of peace, soft-skin. Make sure it stays that way.'

customblocker.name: Blessed Tree
customblocker.description: Grown strong on the strength of the earth, this tree is rich and verdant.

customblocker.name: Blessed Tree
customblocker.description: Grown strong on the strength of the earth, this tree is rich and verdant.

customblocker.name: Blessed Tree
customblocker.description: Grown strong on the strength of the earth, this tree is rich and verdant.

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: Powdered leaves and herbs have been mixed into the wax of these candles.

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: '...Ah, Mother, seeing my daughter like that, to be young and in love again...'

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: The prayers on these candles are etched in old draconic and are illegible to you.

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: '...I desire him, Mother, but I'm not sure if I love him...what should I do?'

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: '...I've lived a good life, Mother, and do not regret it. I await the days I shall return to your fold...'

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: It's another retelling of how the sisters Obsidia and Selzauide fell out and ended up at odds. Seems a pity to light this candle, considering the craftsmanship, but dragons have time.

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: '...And that is the final word of power.'

customblocker.name: Prayer Candles
customblocker.description: '...Rise up unto the land, weary soul, and partake of Her strength...'

customblocker.name: Meditating Dragon
customblocker.description: The words this dragon is speaking to itself make no sense to you whatsoever. Best to back away slowly.

action.text: You place your offering on the altar, and feel a gentle warmth wash away your burdens.
You place your offering on the altar, and gasp as heat flares in your heart.
You place your offering on the altar, and watch as it vanishes and something else takes its place.

customblocker.name: Burning Tree
customblocker.description: A tree burning merrily away with intense heat. There is a fragrant scent in the searing air.

customblocker.name: Burning Tree
customblocker.description: A tree burning merrily away with intense heat. There is a fragrant scent in the searing air.

customblocker.name: Burning Tree
customblocker.description: A tree burning merrily away with intense heat. There is a fragrant scent in the searing air.

customblocker.name: Burning Tree
customblocker.description: A tree burning merrily away with intense heat. There is a fragrant scent in the searing air.

customblocker.name: Lady Svetlana
customblocker.description: The elegant phoenix peers at you and preens herself. 'A challenger? Do you really think you can defeat a force of nature? Foolhardy, but I have not had visitors for so long. Step up to the plate behind me, then, if you are intent on this course of action - but be forewarned, I will not hold back.'

action.name: Lady Svetlana
action.description: Nonplussed by her defeat, Lady Svetlana manages to keep up her air of superiority as she sets her ruffled feathers back in place. 'Very well, I will concede that you ARE strong. But you could be even stronger - here, have the best from my works of art.'

customblocker.name: Faded Portrait
customblocker.description: Whoever this phoenix lady is, she certainly wasn't happy about sitting - or lying - for a portrait.

customblocker.name: Faded Portrait
customblocker.description: Whoever this phoenix lady is, she certainly wasn't happy about sitting - or lying - for a portrait.

customblocker.description: The flames billow and roll in their little nook.

customblocker.description: The fishy little flame beats with the steady rhythm of the waves.

customblocker.name: Sign
customblocker.description: Welcome to the Church Of All Faiths. Please respect your fellow worshippers, even if they don't adhere to your beliefs. No evanglicals or pushers allowed.

customblocker.name: Notice
customblocker.description: Speaking schedule for Thursday - the Atheist Monks. All are welcome to attend and listen.

customblocker.name: Notice
customblocker.description: Please do not incite holy wars on these grounds.

customblocker.name: Fax's Avatar
customblocker.description: PUT A FEDORA ON EVERY KRONG ALTAR FIND A GOD WEAR IT ON YOUR HEAD

customblocker.name: Fax's Avatar
customblocker.description: PUT A FEDORA ON EVERY KRONG ALTAR FIND A GOD WEAR IT ON YOUR HEAD

customblocker.name: Wall Of Ice
customblocker.description: An enormous, solid wall of ice bars your path.

customblocker.name: Wall Of Ice
customblocker.description: An enormous, solid wall of ice bars your path.

customblocker.name: Wall Of Ice
customblocker.description: An enormous, solid wall of ice bars your path.

customblocker.name: Wall Of Ice
customblocker.description: An enormous, solid wall of ice bars your path.

customblocker.name: Wall Of Ice
customblocker.description: An enormous, solid wall of ice bars your path.

customblocker.name: Ancient Cannon
customblocker.description: It's an ancient cannon, and a heavy-duty one at that. Seems like there's still a single shot left inside.

customblocker.name: Icy Pillar
customblocker.description: Why'd it get so cold all of a sudden?

customblocker.name: Icy Pillar
customblocker.description: No, it's definitely not your imagination. The temperature just took a plunge for no good reason.

customblocker.name: Crumbling Pillar
customblocker.description: This pillar doesn't quite match the rest of the dungeon's decor; it's visibly far more ancient than anything else about. Maybe this corridor bears further investigation.

customblocker.name: Wind-Worn Pillar
customblocker.description: Although you're deep underground in the dungeon, an icy tempest sweeps through the room.

customblocker.name: Crumbling Pillar
customblocker.description: This pillar is in deep disrepair and clearly unstable. You wonder how long it'll be before the whole shrine collapses.

customblocker.name: Icy Pillar
customblocker.description: Ancient runes are inscribed into the ice, and you wonder if there's anyone alive who can actually read them now. It's really sobering - is being forgotten by the world the closest a deity can come to death as we know it?

customblocker.name: Icy Pillar
customblocker.description: Pictorograms of feathers have been etched into this pillar of unmelting ice by clearly nonhuman hands. The smooth, flowing strokes suggest grace and motion.

customblocker.name: Freezing Flame
customblocker.description: This bitterly cold flame clings precariously to existence.

customblocker.name: Freezing Flame
customblocker.description: This bitterly cold flame clings precariously to existence.

action.name: Ancient Cannon
action.description: The cannon's now empty, its purpose served. Time to see what lies ahead.

action.text: The cannon's shot explodes into the ice, and the wall shatters!

customblocker.name: Sign
customblocker.description: The sign is old and faded, but the writing on it is still legible: 'Within the ice lies the prize, and thus She puts you to the test. Find your way into the shrine through the winds, and claim their power. Cheat, and suffer Her punishment.'

customblocker.name: Sign
customblocker.description: The sign is old and faded, but the writing on it is still legible: 'Pull this lever, and awaken the path.'

customblocker.name: Freezing Flame
customblocker.description: This bitterly cold flame clings precariously to existence.

customblocker.name: Freezing Flame
customblocker.description: This bitterly cold flame clings precariously to existence.

customengraving.description: Enter this portal to return to the beginning of the puzzle. You're not getting stuck anytime soon.

customengraving.name: Inactive Portal
customengraving.description: This portal is dead and cold. Perhaps something can be done to re-energize it?

customblocker.name: Sign
customblocker.description: The sign is old and faded, but the writing on it is still legible: 'You are warned again: take the prize without solving the puzzle and proving your worth, and you will be punished. Approach the wall of ice to part it, and leave unscathed.'

customblocker.name: Wall Of Ice
customblocker.description: An enormous wall of ice bars your path.

action.name: Windy Portal
action.description: This portal has been renergized and is now active.

action.text: You hear a faint humming resonate in the walls. Maybe something's changed with the portals.
The statue's eyes glow a deep blue for a moment, and a bitter chill twists the very core of your being.
The ice shakes a moment, and then a portion of the wall crumbles away to let you pass.

customblocker.name: Customer Relaxation Unit
customblocker.description: Using the newest statistics methods (mostly involving making up numbers), Brax has found that helping customers relax increases sales per customer by 35 percent.

customblocker.name: Notice Board
customblocker.description: The locals of this dungeon floor have put up various notices about help wanted and community events. Too bad you've slaughtered this thriving and neighbourly community.

customblocker.name: Provocative Advertisment
customblocker.description: It's an advert for Sauron Shakes, complete with a huge, flaming eye staring at you. 'Sauron Shakes - enjoyment will be mandatory.'

customblocker.name: Help Wanted
customblocker.description: Positions are open at this branch for retail assistants. Please inquire with Brax inside.

customblocker.name: Opening Hours
customblocker.description: 'B-Mart opening hours: Any day, any time. I never sleep anyway.'

customblocker.name: Notice
customblocker.description: 'Alcohol and restricted substances are not sold from midnight to 6 am, nor are they for sale to minors.'

customblocker.name: Wall Sconce
customblocker.description: The flames flicker welcomingly at you. Is that incense?

customblocker.name: Wall Sconce
customblocker.description: The flames flicker welcomingly at you. Is that incense?

customblocker.name: Customer Relaxation Unit
customblocker.description: Using the latest salesdemon technology, Brax's forcible customer relaxation unit leaves shoppers fresh, energised and ready to spend more zorkmids - or else.

customblocker.name: Notice Board
customblocker.description: Hmm, seems like there're plenty of pets that've gone missing in the last couple of months or so.

customblocker.name: Poster
customblocker.description: It's a poster advertising the popular band 'The Arrogant Wyrms', which will be performing their hits such as 'Carrotty Juice Is Murder', 'The Last Diggle Pirate' and 'Kill The Eyebrow Next Door'.

customblocker.name: Help Wanted
customblocker.description: 'This particular branch is seeking to open a sandwich bar and is looking to hire workers skilled in food preparation. Hygenic and efficient monsters only - no blobbies allowed.'

customblocker.name: Opening Hours
customblocker.description: 'B-Mart opening hours: Any day, any time. I never sleep anyway.'

customblocker.name: Notice
customblocker.description: 'We do not sell controlled substances in this outlet. Please inquire around the back.'

customblocker.name: Wall Sconce
customblocker.description: The flames flicker welcomingly at you. Is that incense?

customblocker.name: Wall Sconce
customblocker.description: The flames flicker welcomingly at you. Is that incense?

customblocker.name: Customer Relaxation Unit
customblocker.description: Sprayed with richesdoshes, the natural scent all forms of money exude, Brax's patented customer relaxation unit leaves potential shoppers happy and much more willing to lengthen their credit statements.

customblocker.name: Notice Board
customblocker.description: It's filled with small leaflets on which the monsters post little problems they have, and anyone can some along and help out if they feel inclined to. It's a very quaint tradition.

customblocker.name: Poster
customblocker.description: It's a poster advertising tuition services provided by Dredmor Academy and various certifications monsters can pursue.

customblocker.name: Help Wanted
customblocker.description: 'Individual wanted to provide practical demonstrations of my products to potential shoppers. Must possess limbs and opposable thumbs - come inside for a walk-in interview.'

customblocker.name: Opening Hours
customblocker.description: 'B-Mart opening hours: Any day, any time. I never sleep anyway.'

customblocker.name: Notice
customblocker.description: 'B-Mart regrets to inform you that we're all out of Mordor Mango soda for this week. Please check back next week when the shipments arrive.'

customblocker.name: Wall Sconce
customblocker.description: The flames flicker welcomingly at you. Is that incense?

customblocker.name: Wall Sconce
customblocker.description: The flames flicker welcomingly at you. Is that incense?

customblocker.name: Wall Sconce
customblocker.description: The flames flicker welcomingly at you. Is that incense?

customblocker.name: Wall Sconce
customblocker.description: The flames flicker welcomingly at you. Is that incense?

customblocker.name: Block Of Ice
customblocker.description: This convenience store has been hacked out of the ice and is still under construction. There is nothing behind here, trust me on that.

customblocker.name: Block Of Ice
customblocker.description: This convenience store has been hacked out of the ice and is still under construction. There is nothing behind here, trust me on that.

customblocker.name: Block Of Ice
customblocker.description: This convenience store has been hacked out of the ice and is still under construction. There is nothing behind here, trust me on that.

customblocker.name: Warning
customblocker.description: 'Take a good, long look at the last guy who tried to shoplift. Don't be the next one rotting in there.'

customblocker.name: Warning
customblocker.description: Seems like Brax takes employee misconduct just as seriously as shoplifting.

customblocker.name: Wall Sconce
customblocker.description: The flames flicker welcomingly at you. Is that incense?

customblocker.name: Wall Sconce
customblocker.description: The flames flicker welcomingly at you. Is that incense?

customblocker.name: Customer Relaxation Unit
customblocker.description: Mindful of his customers' need to beat the heat on this level, Brax has helpfully provided one of his patented Customer Relaxation Units in the hopes that potential shoppers will sit down, have a drink, and share stories about their shopping experiences at B-Mart and its subsidaries.

customblocker.name: Health Spa Rules
customblocker.description: Seems like Brax's trying his hand at the whole hot springs health spa business.

customblocker.name: Delivery Route
customblocker.description: So this is how Brax gets his goods into the deeper levels of the dungeon. Somehow, you don't believe Dredmor knows of this.

customblocker.name: Iron Bars
customblocker.description: Now, you're not thinking of making a quick escape, are you?

customblocker.name: Wall Sconce
customblocker.description: The flames flicker welcomingly at you. Is that incense?

customblocker.name: Wall Sconce
customblocker.description: The flames flicker welcomingly at you. Is that incense?

customblocker.name: Zen Customer Relaxation Unit
customblocker.description: Seems like Brax's being trying this 'zen garden' thing out. You can't help but feel he's gotten it all wrong, though.

customblocker.name: Big Bonsai
customblocker.description: Wait, if it's not tiny, it doesn't really qualify as a bonsai, does it?

customblocker.name: Big Bonsai
customblocker.description: Wait, if it's not tiny, it doesn't really qualify as a bonsai, does it?

customblocker.name: Big Bonsai
customblocker.description: Wait, if it's not tiny, it doesn't really qualify as a bonsai, does it?

customblocker.name: Big Bonsai
customblocker.description: Wait, if it's not tiny, it doesn't really qualify as a bonsai, does it?

customblocker.name: Wall Sconce
customblocker.description: The flames flicker welcomingly at you. Is that incense?

customblocker.name: Wanted Poster
customblocker.description: 'Have you seen this large-eyebrowed person? They are wanted on charges of debt defaultment and wanton fiscal irresponsibility. Please contact Brax at earliest notice.'

customblocker.name: Stocktaking Board
customblocker.description: Yep, seems like Brax is on the ball when it comes to stocktaking. Then again, did you expect anything else?

customblocker.name: Wine Cask
customblocker.description: Keeping wine cool is an important part of proper shipping. Seems like Brax's leveraged the local dungeon water supply to these ends.

customblocker.name: Wine Cask
customblocker.description: The label on this cask reads 'Fengrove Hills 2012'.

customblocker.name: Wine Barrel
customblocker.description: It's a barrel of Orcish wine. Orc wizards need to replenish their mana just like any other wizard - the whole 'drink eating through your innards' thing is a bonus.

customblocker.name: Wine Barrel
customblocker.description: This barrel holds elven joy juice. It's not like every monster in the dungeon casts spells, after all.

customblocker.name: Barrel
customblocker.description: This barrel holds an assortment of delicious fresh fruit. The smell wafting from it is enough to set your mouth watering.

customblocker.name: Pickling Barrel
customblocker.description: A pungent stench wafts across the water from this barrel and sends you gagging. What IS it with these people and their pickled fish products?

customblocker.name: Mysterious Chest
customblocker.description: This tightly sealed chest has the word 'fate' etched in gold on its lid.

customblocker.name: Empty Chest
customblocker.description: So THAT's where all those chests come from.

customengraving.name: Delivery Portal
customengraving.description: A delivery portal for quick and speedy delivery of goods. A faint sheen of energy covers its surface, barring entry to all but those of the porter and deliveryman's guild.

customblocker.name: Wall Sconce
customblocker.description: The flames flicker welcomingly at you. Is that incense?

customblocker.name: Wall Sconce
customblocker.description: The flames flicker welcomingly at you. Is that incense?

customblocker.name: Poster
customblocker.description: 'Welcome to Brax's crab cookout! All you can eat crab buffets beginning at five hundred zorkmids, with a free flow of lemon sauce.'

customblocker.name: Wall Sconce
customblocker.description: The flames flicker welcomingly at you. Is that incense?

customblocker.name: Notice
customblocker.description: 'Welcome to Brax's do-it-yourself, where you can experience the thrill of a unique service customised to your own personalised needs!'

customblocker.name: Brazier
customblocker.description: These flames burn for the glory of Krong.

customblocker.name: Brazier
customblocker.description: These flames burn for the glory of Krong.

loot.subtype: My Little Anvil Junior Smithing Kit

customblocker.name: Discarded Plans
customblocker.description: Several diagrams have been hastily scribbled here, each and every one of them crossed out in red ink.

customblocker.name: Old Desk
customblocker.description: There's a notebook on this desk, where the Roguish Renovator keeps all his hastily-jotted ideas (which usually come on the bus). You really shouldn't sneak a peek.

customblocker.name: Computer
customblocker.description: Ah-ha! So that's what the Roguish Renovator is up to these days! Encrustments? Daggers? Ach...

customblocker.name: Computer
customblocker.description: Eh, it's an average computer. Not the beefiest, but not the worst, either. Two words, really - college student.

customblocker.name: Congratulations, Do You Want A Cookie?
customblocker.description: Congratulations! You found the Roguish Renovator's secret room! Check back here after every update - things might change!

customblocker.name: Tomb of the Lotions Mistress
customblocker.description: Unfortunately, despite her skill, she was unable to solve the problem of her own greasy hair.

customengraving.name: Floor Candles
customengraving.description: The candles flicker aloofly at you.

customengraving.name: Floor Candles
customengraving.description: The candles flicker aloofly at you.

customengraving.name: Floor Candles
customengraving.description: The candles flicker aloofly at you.

customengraving.name: Floor Candles
customengraving.description: The candles flicker aloofly at you.

customblocker.name: Tomb of Paladinner
customblocker.description: 'Here lies Paladinner, a holy knight who died much as he lived: morbidly obese. Considerable artist's license given in the commissioning of this likeness.'

customblocker.name: Wall Sconce
customblocker.description: The flames struggle to stay lit in the dank air of the catacombs.

customblocker.name: Wall Sconce
customblocker.description: The flames struggle to stay lit in the dank air of the catacombs.

customblocker.name: Grave of Haldurson
customblocker.description: Smart guy, enjoyed logic puzzles. Very smart indeed. But not smart enough not to be dead.

customblocker.name: Grave of Alister
customblocker.description: After a long and successful career, Alister the sneak thief tried to open a trap shop. Unfortunately, it failed to pass safety regulations.

customblocker.name: Grave of Arimia
customblocker.description: Crazy cat lady. Sadly, this is the most notable thing about her we could find to carve on her headstone, so it'll have to do.

customblocker.name: Wall Sconce
customblocker.description: The flames struggle to stay lit in the dank air of the catacombs.

customengraving.name: Enigmatic Portal
customengraving.description: Now where does this lead? Dare you chance it?

customengraving.name: Windy Portal
customengraving.description: You can hear the faint howling of wind resounding in the air above this portal. Where will it take you?

customengraving.name: Floor Candles

customblocker.name: Catacombs Records
customblocker.description: Meticulous records are kept of all the dead interred within Dredmor's catacombs.

customblocker.name: Catacombs Records
customblocker.description: For some reason, there's been a mysterious uptick in the rate of suicides. Disturbing.

customblocker.name: Catacombs Records
customblocker.description: It seems like cremation is becoming an increasingly popular option these days. No one likes the idea of having one's remains shambling around, even if they're not being used by their original owner any more.

customblocker.name: Catacombs Records
customblocker.description: It's a zomby-feeding schedule. If these records are to be believed, it seems their penchant for brains is vastly over-reported.

customblocker.name: Tomb of Shakii
customblocker.description: Known by the moniker 'the Wolf', the seventh king of Shake (pronounced 'shark-kay') repelled an invasion of golems, cyclops, cuddly forest creatures and other assorted nasties led by the dread villain Midnight Sword.

customengraving.name: Floor Candles
customengraving.description: The candles flicker aloofly at you.

customengraving.name: Floor Candles
customengraving.description: The candles flicker aloofly at you.

customblocker.name: Creepy Clock
customblocker.description: This clock keeps spinning and spinning...ugh, you feel dizzy.

customblocker.name: Creepy Clock
customblocker.description: It tells the correct time twice a day. At least.

customblocker.name: Creepy Clock
customblocker.description: At least it's not one of those explosive dwarven cuckoos you hear so much about.

customblocker.name: Creepy Clock
customblocker.description: Why is this thing all...sandy?

customblocker.name: Creepy Clock
customblocker.description: You're pretty sure there aren't any ghosts hiding in this thing, but don't you want to check it anyway?

customblocker.name: Creepy Clock
customblocker.description: Tick...tock...tick...tock...it's strangely hypnotic.

customblocker.name: Creepy Clock
customblocker.description: The clock is everything. Embrace the clock. BE the clock.

customblocker.name: Creepy Clock
customblocker.description: According to this aged timepiece, the time is 42 o' clock.

customblocker.description: The nests of the Coldflame Phoenix, delicately crafted from frozen spit, are often harvested and used in dessert delicacies in the far-off land of Shin.

customblocker.name: Fungal Reading Lamp
customblocker.description: The mushroom cluster emits a soft glow, perfect for reading by.

customblocker.name: Couch
customblocker.description: An old, well-worn reading couch. It's suprisingly free of mould, although the same can't be said of the coffee stains.

customblocker.name: Couch
customblocker.description: An old, well-worn reading couch. It's suprisingly free of mould, although the same can't be said of the coffee stains.

customblocker.name: Reading Table
customblocker.description: Slightly mouldy but still homely.

customblocker.name: Bookshelf
customblocker.description: Within these shelves lies a well-thumbed copy of 'The Stars Are Left'.

customblocker.name: Bookshelf
customblocker.description: Several home-improvement magazines lie on these shelves, mostly old copies of 'Roguish Renovation'.

customblocker.name: Sign
customblocker.description: Get ready to hold the bridge!

customblocker.name: Sign
customblocker.description: Get ready to hold the bridge!

action.text: Hold that bridge!

customblocker.description: There're some empty hyperborean potion bottles here.

customblocker.description: This wine cask feels cold to the touch.

customblocker.name: Wine Cask
customblocker.description: Drops of condensation coat the surface of this wine cask.

customblocker.name: Wine Barrel
customblocker.description: The outside of this barrel reads 'Elfland 1381'. It was a good year, as you remember.

customblocker.name: Wine Barrel
customblocker.description: Is this barrel cooling the water, or is it the other way around?

customblocker.name: Table
customblocker.description: An ancient, wine-stained table of crude elvish make.

customblocker.name: Small Furnace
customblocker.description: It seems like this furnace was specially made for the making of fine trinkets.

customblocker.name: Reading Table
customblocker.description: Because lava provides the best light for reading by.

customblocker.name: Smelter
customblocker.description: There's no residue in this smelter to tell you what was worked with at this forge.

customblocker.name: Smelter
customblocker.description: There's no residue in this smelter to tell you what was worked with at this forge.

customblocker.name: Storage Tank
customblocker.description: This storage tank is still hooked up to the adjoining smelter. It's empty, but a strange smell of spring lingers.

customblocker.name: Table
customblocker.description: Stained with grease and old food.

customblocker.name: Furnace
customblocker.description: This furnace looks like it was used for personal comfort, although why would anyone need to be warmer here?

customblocker.name: Nipped Skeleton
customblocker.description: The first victim of the crab apocalypse.

customengraving.name: Pinched Skeleton
customengraving.description: This guy didn't take the crab threat seriously.

customengraving.name: Pinched Skeleton
customengraving.description: This guy didn't take the crab threat seriously.

customengraving.name: Poked Skeleton
customengraving.description: Frank, who died as he lived - tight and pinched.

customengraving.name: Poked Skeleton
customengraving.description: Frank, who died as he lived - tight and pinched.

customengraving.name: Prodded Skeleton
customengraving.description: Armed with five bottles of lemon sauce, this poor man fought valiantly against the crab horde.

customengraving.name: Prodded Skeleton
customengraving.description: Armed with five bottles of lemon sauce, this poor man fought valiantly against the crab horde.

customblocker.name: Sign
customblocker.description: Top secret crab hideout. Please go away.

customblocker.name: Nefarious Plans
customblocker.description: It's the Crab King's plans for world domination. They mostly involve pinching people until they give in, a surprisingly effective strategy.

customblocker.name: Table
customblocker.description: An ancient, wine-stained table.

customblocker.name: Table
customblocker.description: An ancient, wine-stained table.

customblocker.name: Wine Cask
customblocker.description: They say the longer wine's aged, the better the vintage. Well, this one's got to be the best, then.

customblocker.name: Wine Cask
customblocker.description: There's a hose connected directly to this wine cask.

customblocker.name: Wine Cask
customblocker.description: It's a lovely nineteen forty-four vintage. Defintitely top of the line.

customblocker.name: Fancy Grave
customblocker.description: ...Next, to my alcoholic brother, to dear Hedge who has never worked a day in his drunken life, I leave my wine cellar and three crates of my finest whisky. And a boot to the head.

customblocker.name: Burning Tree
customblocker.description: Now just how is this supposed to represent wisdom? You don't quite get it, do you?

customblocker.name: Fragment of Alric's journal
customblocker.description: The beauty of these sunken gardens shines through an age of dust and decay. Why did they fall to ruin? Could the same corruption that affects me be responsible for this centuries-old destruction? The thought that this blight could be so ancient unnerves me, but if it consumes me I must go deep enough that I can never escape to do harm. And, there is still hope. A fool's hope, but I cling to it.

customblocker.name: Strange Crystals
customblocker.description: These strange crystals have a magical feel about them.

customblocker.name: Strange Crystals
customblocker.description: These strange crystals have a magical feel about them.

customblocker.name: Strange Crystals
customblocker.description: These strange crystals have a magical feel about them.

customblocker.description: These strange crystals have a magical feel about them.

customblocker.name: Wall Sconce
customblocker.description: The flames flicker welcomingly at you. Is that incense?

customblocker.name: Wall Sconce
customblocker.description: The flames flicker welcomingly at you. Is that incense?

customblocker.name: Sign
customblocker.description: 'Welcome to Brax's self-service pet shop! Stay awhile and see if we can't get you a decent bodyguard!'

customblocker.name: Sign
customblocker.description: 'Please, pull the lever to dispense one free sample of your own private bodyguard. Warning: system may malfunction at times and catch fire. User beware.'

customblocker.name: Diggle
customblocker.description: 'The finest specimen of poingus poingus we have to offer - guaranteed house-trained or your money back!'

customblocker.name: Zomby
customblocker.description: 'The perfect match for the masked serial killer! Don't want anyone stumbling upon the trail of bodies you leave behind? Don't worry, your faithful (and mindlessly so) zomby minion will gladly pick up and eat up after you!'

customblocker.name: Statue
customblocker.description: 'The ultimate in low maintenance pets! Doesn't need food or sleep, impervious to acid and many common hazards, and best of all, when you get bored of it, you can put it away in a closet until it's ready to be taken out again, if ever! What more could you ask for?'

customblocker.name: Raven
customblocker.description: 'Tired of not being unique and individual? Be one of a kind by dressing up like everyone else, acting like them and even getting a pet to match!'

customblocker.name: Doom Shroom
customblocker.description: 'Not for the faint of heart! The pet with the shortest life expectancy ever can now be yours for fifteen easy payments of a thousand zorkmids!'

customblocker.name: Dread Collector
customblocker.description: 'Tired of having your horse or wagon stolen in the parking lot? An expensive alarm won't protect your horse - but a big red guy named Boozlebubba will!'

customblocker.name: Commando Mural
customblocker.description: The inscription under the mural reads 'Who dares, digs.', the motto of the diggle commandos.

customblocker.name: Commando Mural
customblocker.description: The inscription under the mural reads 'Who dares, digs.', the motto of the diggle commandos.

customblocker.name: Monitor
customblocker.description: Seems like they've got camera installed in the hallway outside the door.

customblocker.name: Armoury Door
customblocker.description: These solid steel bars secure the diggle commandos' armoury.

customblocker.name: Table
customblocker.description: Even the best of the best have to sit down for lunch, you know.

customengraving.name: Cupboard
customengraving.description: For holding the various odds and ends of a diggle commando's kit.

customengraving.name: Cupboard
customengraving.description: For holding the various odds and ends of a diggle commando's kit.

customengraving.name: Cupboard
customengraving.description: For holding the various odds and ends of a diggle commando's kit.

customengraving.name: Cupboard
customengraving.description: For holding the various odds and ends of a diggle commando's kit.

customblocker.name: Tea Table
customblocker.description: A small, old table.

customblocker.name: Fire Pit
customblocker.description: Traditionally used by the Mustacle League to roast fish on sticks and boil kettles over.

customblocker.name: Folding Screen
customblocker.description: A rough approximation of a Japanese folding screen. Sure, it doesn't LOOK very much like one, but you have to give the Mustache League an A for effort.

customblocker.name: Folding Screen
customblocker.description: A rough approximation of a Japanese folding screen. Sure, it doesn't LOOK very much like one, but you have to give the Mustache League an A for effort.

customblocker.name: Charred Skeleton
customblocker.description: These bones have been quite thoroughly blackened.

customblocker.name: Scorched Bones
customblocker.description: The remains of the last schmuck who didn't heed the warm- I mean, warning.

customblocker.name: Sign
customblocker.description: Dredmor crematorium controls. Engage lever to start incinerators and make everything die in a fire. This includes you.

action.name: Sign
action.description: Really? I TOLD you this would happen, and you did it anyway?

action.text: The lava pits on either side explode in flame, covering the whole pit in fire and brimstone!

customblocker.name: Scraggly Tree
customblocker.description: This tree looks pale and unhealthy. Mushroom clusters gather about its roots.

customblocker.name: Scraggly Tree
customblocker.description: This tree looks pale and unhealthy. Mushroom clusters gather about its roots.

customblocker.name: Scraggly Tree
customblocker.description: This tree looks pale and unhealthy. Mushroom clusters gather about its roots.

customblocker.name: Scraggly Tree
customblocker.description: This tree looks pale and unhealthy. Mushroom clusters gather about its roots.

customblocker.name: Ghostly Flame
customblocker.description: These flames look distinctly eerie. You're half-expecting a ghost trick of some sort.

customblocker.name: Ghostly Flame
customblocker.description: These flames look distinctly eerie. You're half-expecting a ghost trick of some sort.

customblocker.name: Ghostly Flame
customblocker.description: These flames look distinctly eerie. You're half-expecting a ghost trick of some sort.

customblocker.name: Ghostly Flame
customblocker.description: These flames look distinctly eerie. You're half-expecting a ghost trick of some sort.

customblocker.name: Sign
customblocker.description: Is there something in here? Is there not?

customblocker.name: Sign
customblocker.description: There's only one way to tell: you need to go further! Deeper!

customblocker.name: Crude Sign
customblocker.description: 'Four and twenty blackbirds, baked in a pie.'

customblocker.name: Advertisment
customblocker.description: It's an advert for Dr. Darn's gears of war, guaranteed to make one's catapults, ballistae, and other siege weapons run at least 50% more efficiently - or your money back.

customblocker.name: Sign
customblocker.description: Welcome to Dungeon Depot, your one-stop shop for all your dungeon improvement needs!

customblocker.name: Shop Counter
customblocker.description: Naturally, it's made of the very materials sold at this outlet. what better form of advertising is there?

customblocker.name: Shop Counter
customblocker.description: Naturally, it's made of the very materials sold at this outlet. what better form of advertising is there?

customblocker.name: Shop Counter
customblocker.description: Smells vaguely of metal and wood resin. Many a deadly bolt has passed over this counter.

customblocker.name: Shop Counter
customblocker.description: Smells vaguely of metal and wood resin. Many a deadly bolt has passed over this counter.

customblocker.name: Shop Counter
customblocker.description: Smells vaguely of metal and wood resin. Many a deadly bolt has passed over this counter.

customblocker.name: Advertisment
customblocker.description: 'In the latest edition of Bows and Ammo: crossbows versus thrown weapons, the great debate! Shelley de Killer examines the pros and cons of both options, and weighs in with his professional opinion!'

customblocker.name: Notice
customblocker.description: 'Wanted: someone to get me some good old-fashioned cola from down the street.'

customblocker.name: Poster
customblocker.description: This is an officially approved retailer for Bolt Council goods.

customblocker.name: Poster
customblocker.description: Ammo-nation: your one-stop shop for all your ranged needs!

customblocker.name: Display Rack
customblocker.description: A display rack for the latest in ranged weaponry.

customblocker.name: Display Rack
customblocker.description: A display rack for the latest in ranged weaponry.

customblocker.name: Shop Counter
customblocker.description: Smells vaguely of metal and wood resin. Many a deadly bolt has passed over this counter.

customblocker.name: Shop Counter
customblocker.description: Smells vaguely of metal and wood resin. Many a deadly bolt has passed over this counter.

customblocker.name: Shop Counter
customblocker.description: Smells vaguely of metal and wood resin. Many a deadly bolt has passed over this counter.

customblocker.name: Advertisment
customblocker.description: 'In the latest edition of Bows and Ammo: learn to make your own deadly bolts to Bolt Council standards! This magazine is available at your local crossbow retailer today!'

customblocker.name: Notice
customblocker.description: 'No browsing. This rule will be enforced with lethal force.' Sure, no store with a magazine rack likes people browsing without paying, but this is a little extreme, isn't it?

customblocker.name: Poster
customblocker.description: This is an officially approved retailer for Bolt Council goods.

customblocker.name: Poster
customblocker.description: Ammo-nation: your one-stop shop for all your ranged needs!

customblocker.name: Display Rack
customblocker.description: A display rack for the latest in ranged weaponry.

customblocker.name: Display Rack
customblocker.description: A display rack for the latest in ranged weaponry.

customblocker.name: Thinking Machine
customblocker.description: It's one of those thinking machines. It doesn't look too bright.

customblocker.name: Thinking Machine
customblocker.description: It's one of those thinking machines. It doesn't look too bright.

customblocker.name: Security Desk
customblocker.description: The Diggle Commandos monitor all of the dungeon from the comfort of this desk. 'Monitored from a remote location' indeed.

customblocker.name: Security Desk
customblocker.description: The Diggle Commandos monitor all of the dungeon from the comfort of this desk. 'Monitored from a remote location' indeed.

customblocker.name: Security Desk
customblocker.description: The Diggle Commandos monitor all of the dungeon from the comfort of this desk. 'Monitored from a remote location' indeed.

customblocker.name: Security Desk
customblocker.description: The Diggle Commandos monitor all of the dungeon from the comfort of this desk. 'Monitored from a remote location' indeed.

customblocker.name: Security Monitor
customblocker.description: This security monitor displays the inside of Diggle Glee Club. You feel slightly dirty watching the events transpiring within.

customblocker.name: Security Monitor
customblocker.description: This security monitor displays the nuts and bolts of Dredmor's evisceration chutes. Guess he can't have people escaping, can he?

customblocker.name: Security Monitor
customblocker.description: This security monitor displays...you really don't recognise this place. It's all gross and meaty, with horrible...things about. Maybe it's some other dimension.

customblocker.name: Security Monitor
customblocker.description: This security monitor displays the bottom of one of the numerous pools in the dungeon. Is that something large and dark gliding through the water? Might make a good news story or two.

customblocker.name: Security Monitor
customblocker.description: This security monitor displays the inside of a McDiggle's. Are employee-employer relations really THAT bad in the dungeon?

customblocker.name: Security Monitor
customblocker.description: This security monitor displays the dungeon's entrance. Guess that's how they knew when to slam down the iron bars to bar your escape, eh?

customblocker.name: Security Monitor
customblocker.description: This security monitor displays the inner workings of a nether dimension where ancient beings stir. Ah, the march of technology - who needs horrifying portals when you can view the forbidden through a simple monitor?

customblocker.name: Security Monitor
customblocker.description: This security monitor displays the insides of a bathroom on floor 4. Surely this can't be approved...

customblocker.name: Security Monitor
customblocker.description: This security monitor displays several hidden rooms on floors you've visited. Do you really want to backtrack to try and find them again?

customblocker.name: Security Monitor
customblocker.description: This security monitor displays Lord Dredmor's evil stash, painstakingly distiled from ground-up gnomes. At least that explains why there're so many ingot grinders hanging around the place...

customblocker.name: Security Monitor
customblocker.description: This security monitor displays several Diggle Rocketeers tinkering away with their equipment. Just watching them makes you feel ashamed of your own skill.

customblocker.name: Security Monitor
customblocker.description: This security monitor displays...grass? Are the Diggle Commandos really so bored that they'd be willing to watch grass grow?

customblocker.name: Security Monitor
customblocker.description: This security monitor displays several suspicious-looking diggles running around the dungeon stocking vending machines and laying traps. Guess the place has a maintenance crew, after all.

customblocker.name: Security Monitor
customblocker.description: This security monitor displays the insides of most of Brax's shops. Well, naturally Dredmor isn't going to trust that used-gear salesman any more than he could...um...throw a large, heavy object.

customblocker.name: Printing Press
customblocker.description: The moulds in this old smelter have been converted through diggle ingenuity to printing plates.

customblocker.name: Printing Press
customblocker.description: This old smelter has been fitted with clockwork innards and turned into a printing press.

customblocker.name: Printing Press
customblocker.description: The moulds in this old smelter have been converted through diggle ingenuity to printing plates.

customblocker.name: Printing Press
customblocker.description: This old smelter has been fitted with clockwork innards and turned into a printing press.

customblocker.name: Ink Storage
customblocker.description: This is where they store the ink for the printing presses.

customblocker.name: Ink Storage
customblocker.description: This is where they store the ink for the printing presses. This one's leaking terribly.

customblocker.name: Ink Storage
customblocker.description: This is where they store the ink for the printing presses.

customblocker.name: Ink Puddle
customblocker.description: A large puddle of ink. Just where does Dredmor get so much ink from?

customblocker.name: Notice
customblocker.description: Be careful when using the printing presses. Damaging the printing presses, whether intentional or otherwise, will result in deportation to Happyville.

customblocker.name: Poster
customblocker.description: 'Welcome. Welcome to the Dungeons of Dredmor. It's safer here.'

customblocker.name: Poster
customblocker.description: 'There's nothing in the water. Don't worry about it - the diggles drink it, don't they?'

customblocker.name: Poster
customblocker.description: 'This is the enemy. The first step to defending yourself is knowledge. Burn this image in your mind, that you will see it around every corner, in every hole.'

customblocker.name: Poster
customblocker.description: 'These eyebrows, they do not conform to DSHA standards and regulations. Report them on sight immediately.'

customblocker.name: Poster
customblocker.description: 'You love the Dungeons of Dredmor. This is prime real estate, after all. There is nowhere more friendlier.'

customblocker.name: Desk
customblocker.description: A spartan artist's desk, and little else. It's just like Dredmor to not even give his artists proper working conditions. Little wonder his propoganda is slightly...underwhelming.

customblocker.name: Desk
customblocker.description: A spartan artist's desk, and little else. It's just like Dredmor to not even give his artists proper working conditions. Little wonder his propoganda is slightly...underwhelming.

customblocker.name: Desk
customblocker.description: A spartan artist's desk, and little else. It's just like Dredmor to not even give his artists proper working conditions. Little wonder his propoganda is slightly...underwhelming.

customblocker.name: Desk
customblocker.description: A spartan artist's desk, and little else. It's just like Dredmor to not even give his artists proper working conditions. Little wonder his propoganda is slightly...underwhelming.

customblocker.name: Empty Pedestal
customblocker.description: This pedestal used to hold an ancient and powerful artifact, emphasis on 'USED'. It was taken pretty recently, too - there's still an clean outline in the dust where it used to be.

customblocker.name: Well-Used Anvil
customblocker.description: While the choice of muscle diggles is only natural for the job, it does tend to increase wear and tear on the equipment.

customblocker.name: Well-Used Anvil
customblocker.description: While the choice of muscle diggles is only natural for the job, it does tend to increase wear and tear on the equipment.

customblocker.name: Well-Used Anvil
customblocker.description: While the choice of muscle diggles is only natural for the job, it does tend to increase wear and tear on the equipment.

customblocker.name: Metal Smelter
customblocker.description: The smelter molds here are suspiciously golem-shaped.

customblocker.name: Metal Smelter
customblocker.description: A smelter for extracting gold from ore.

customblocker.name: Table
customblocker.description: Is it really a good idea to have the break table that close to the smelters?

customblocker.name: Table
customblocker.description: Is it really a good idea to have the break table that close to the smelters?

customblocker.name: Ancient Message
customblocker.description: Most of the writing here is faded, but you can make out one clear line: '...And keep that staff of yours in your pants! I don't want you to go about showing it off to anyone, it's very embarrassing!'

customblocker.name: Notice
customblocker.description: This site has worked 0 days without an accident.

customblocker.name: Recording Device
customblocker.description: This dastardly automaton tracks output from each individual monster and automatically slates underperformers for a session with the evisceration chute.

customblocker.name: Dredmor Assembly Line Workbench
customblocker.description: Seems like the occupant of this bench is slightly more skilled than your average assembly-line worker.

customblocker.name: Dredmor Assembly Line Workbench
customblocker.description: The occupant of this bench probably hasn't clocked out in years.

customblocker.name: Dredmor Assembly Line Workbench
customblocker.description: Blood, sweat, tears and toil - all have been ingrained into the wood of this workbench.

customblocker.name: Dredmor Assembly Line Workbench
customblocker.description: Various tools lie scattered across this workbench. Seems like your arrival was the perfect excuse for the monsters to take a break.

customblocker.name: Dredmor Assembly Line Workbench
customblocker.description: There's an ancient packed lunch in the depths of this workbench. Mmm...weenies.

customblocker.name: Dredmor Assembly Line Workbench
customblocker.description: The previous occupant of this workbench has been counting out...days? Years? Hours? You can't tell, but the marks in the wood offer no further explanation.

customblocker.name: Magnetronic Finisher
customblocker.description: For powering up various charged pieces of equipment.

customblocker.name: Murder Victim
customblocker.description: Yuck, looks like an ugly affair.

customblocker.name: Chalk Outline
customblocker.description: This one looks like...a fish? Were there more murder victims?

customblocker.name: Chalk Outline
customblocker.description: Seems like the detectives didn't have time to finish this one before you arrived on the scene.

customblocker.name: Tofu Recipe
customblocker.description: It's an ancient mustache recipe for tofu that promotes hair growth. Once you get out of here, you are getting SO rich curing baldness.

customblocker.name: Ancient Mustache Saying
customblocker.description: 'Fa Zi says - 'one who eats tofu has...um...something or the other, can't quite remember what I was going to say...''

customblocker.name: Bucket
customblocker.description: It's full of homogenised soy protein.

customblocker.name: Bucket
customblocker.description: So THAT's where tofu comes from? To be fair, you wouldn't eat cheese either, if you'd seen it in the making.

customblocker.name: Bucket
customblocker.description: Just how do the mustaches manage to...you know what, never mind. It's best not thought about.

customblocker.name: Recycling Bin
customblocker.description: Gold ore often contains many other useful metals that can be produced as by-products of the process.

customblocker.name: Gold Smelter
customblocker.description: The smelter molds here are suspiciously golem-shaped.

customblocker.name: Gold Smelter
customblocker.description: A smelter for extracting gold from ore.

customblocker.name: Storage Bin
customblocker.description: For storing various raw materials.

customblocker.name: Storage Bin
customblocker.description: For storing various raw materials.

customblocker.name: Notice
customblocker.description: This site has worked 21 days without an accident.

customblocker.name: ItsAlive(TM) Animator
customblocker.description: This piece of equipment is a standard workhorse of animatory magic - it's a commonly known fact that you can create life with a good jolt of electricity.

customblocker.name: ItsAlive(TM) Animator
customblocker.description: This piece of equipment is a standard workhorse of animatory magic - it's a commonly known fact that you can create life with a good jolt of electricity.

customblocker.name: Notice
customblocker.description: Do not use the ItsAlive(TM) animator without proper supervision and safety equipment. Failure to comply is in clear violation of DSHA regulations.

customblocker.name: Poster
customblocker.description: It's the material safety data sheet and spill cleanup response guidelines for all the chemicals in this fabrication plant.

customblocker.name: Shelf
customblocker.description: For holding important alchemical components.

customblocker.name: Shelf
customblocker.description: For holding important alchemical components.

customblocker.name: Shelf
customblocker.description: For holding important alchemical components.

customblocker.name: Sign
customblocker.description: Pick a shield, but choose wisely.

action.text: So, you've made your choice. Don't regret it.
So, you've made your choice. Don't regret it.

So, you've made your choice. Don't regret it.

pedestal.name: Organiser
pedestal.text: Things to do today - 1. Collect evidence. 2. Play logic chess. 3. Solve mysteries. 4. Prosecute in court. 5. Profit!

customblocker.name: Desk
customblocker.description: A lawyer's desk, littered with tools to be used in the quest for the perfect truth.

customblocker.name: Desk

customblocker.description: The files in here hold all the cases this particular lawyer has taken.

customblocker.description: Curatives for Diggle Flu are to be rationed. Get in line and wait your turn.

customblocker.name: Stocktaking Records
customblocker.description: Seems like there's been a recent epidemic of Diggle Flu.

customblocker.name: Employee Records
customblocker.description: It's a list of various diggle names. Some have been crossed out, with 'collect insurance' written next to them in a distinctly bony hand.

customblocker.description: The flames billow and roll in their little nook.

customblocker.description: The flames billow and roll in their little nook.

customblocker.description: Of course, Dredmor's going to be looking down on all the court proceedings.

customblocker.description: What a farce.

customblocker.description: Audience Gallery 1.

customblocker.description: Audience Gallery 2.

customblocker.name: Poster
customblocker.description: It's a poster proclaiming tonight's event - the face-off between heavyweight Big Red wrestlers Hastoo and Ligger.

customblocker.name: Champion's Visage
customblocker.description: It's a portrait of Arnurld Schwarzebub, champion of this event for the past three years running.

customblocker.name: Champion's Visage
customblocker.description: It's a portrait of Arnurld Schwarzebub, champion of this event for the past three years running.

customblocker.name: Referee's Bench
customblocker.description: Is there really a point to a referee at this kind of sporting event?

customblocker.name: Referee's Bench
customblocker.description: Is there really a point to a referee at this kind of sporting event?

customblocker.name: Referee's Bench
customblocker.description: Is there really a point to a referee at this kind of sporting event?

customblocker.name: Recording Device
customblocker.description: It's one of those new aetheric clicky devices. You know, like the ones they use at the clickies.

customblocker.name: Aetheric Transmitter
customblocker.description: This device was supposed to send this event live across the aetherwaves. Now everyone watching knows that you happily went and slaughtered everyone here.

customblocker.name: Block Of Ice
customblocker.description: Oh, snap. Hell (or at least, the closest thing to it in this game) HAS frozen over. Seems like you owe Linda five Zorkmids.

customblocker.name: Block Of Ice
customblocker.description: Oh, snap. Hell (or at least, the closest thing to it in this game) HAS frozen over. Seems like you owe Linda five Zorkmids.

customblocker.name: Block Of Ice
customblocker.description: Oh, snap. Hell (or at least, the closest thing to it in this game) HAS frozen over. Seems like you owe Linda five Zorkmids.

customblocker.name: Beefy Computer
customblocker.description: Not surprising, really.

customblocker.name: Monitor
customblocker.description: Seems like they're playing 'Call of Dredmor' here.

customblocker.name: Beefy Computer
customblocker.description: This computer is really cheap. What was Dredmor's budget again?

customblocker.name: Monitor
customblocker.description: No, you fool! Duck behind cover before you recharge your wand!

customblocker.name: Beefy Computer
customblocker.description: There are plenty of cheese-stained fingerprints on this computer.

customblocker.name: Monitor
customblocker.description: Trashy, overpriced games. That's all they play these days. Frankly, you blame consoles for it all.

customblocker.name: Beefy Computer
customblocker.description: This computer has been designed to be operated with flippers.

customblocker.name: Monitor
customblocker.description: There're plans in here for something called 'the raiding chair'. It sounds really painful.

customblocker.name: Trash Can
customblocker.description: This trash can is filled with wrappers that formerly housed various unhealthy snacks.

customblocker.name: Trash Can
customblocker.description: This trash can is filled with wrappers that formerly housed various unhealthy snacks.

customblocker.name: Frozen Skeleton
customblocker.description: Remember, folks. Freezing yourself into stasis is NOT an acceptable method of time-travel.

customblocker.name: Block Of Ice
customblocker.description: Gotta keep the meat cold, y'know.

customblocker.name: Block Of Ice
customblocker.description: Gotta keep the meat cold, y'know.

customblocker.name: Notice
customblocker.description: Walk-in freezer - employees only.

customblocker.name: Deep-Fryer
customblocker.description: This deep-fryer has unidentifiable meat patties floating in the bubbling oil. Quick and easy!

customblocker.name: Deep-Fryer
customblocker.description: This one's filled with starchy salted sticks. Whatever they are, they'll never catch on with PROPER people.

customblocker.name: Food Preparation Counter
customblocker.description: They may give it a fancy name, but it's really just an old table. Still, it's DSHA compliant, and that's what counts.

customblocker.name: Food Preparation Counter
customblocker.description: They may give it a fancy name, but it's really just an old table. Still, it's DSHA compliant, and that's what counts.

customblocker.name: Condiment Dispenser
customblocker.description: Despite what Dredmor may say, ketchup is NOT a vegetable, and neither is mustard.

customblocker.name: Soda Dispenser
customblocker.description: 'Dredmor Durian' - the soda you love or hate. As opposed to 'Mordor Mango' or 'Sauron Shakes', which demand your love.

customblocker.name: Soda Dispenser
customblocker.description: Do you REALLY want to drink something named 'Carrotty Cola'?

customblocker.name: Counter
customblocker.description: Welcome to McDiggle's. May I take your order?

customblocker.name: Counter
customblocker.description: Welcome to McDiggle's. May I take your order?

customblocker.name: Counter
customblocker.description: Welcome to McDiggle's. May I take your order?

customblocker.name: Counter
customblocker.description: Welcome to McDiggle's. May I take your order?

customblocker.name: Counter
customblocker.description: Welcome to McDiggle's. May I take your order?

customblocker.name: Counter
customblocker.description: Welcome to McDiggle's. May I take your order?

customblocker.name: Advertisment
customblocker.description: Na na na na na - McDiggle's, I'm hating it!

customblocker.name: Advertisment
customblocker.description: This is a sublimal message. Devour doomed dinners at McDiggle's, all at half-price today! Pizza sandwiches are being served!

customblocker.name: Provocative Advertisment
customblocker.description: It's an advertisment for Mordor Mango soda, complete with the Bitch-King slouching magnificently in his throne.

customblocker.name: Customer Seating
customblocker.description: It's stained with all sorts of suspicious sauces.

customblocker.name: Customer Seating
customblocker.description: Someone left part of a meal here. It mostly consists of things even you wouldn't eat. Seems like we have a critic here.

customblocker.name: Customer Seating
customblocker.description: There's something scrawled into the table here. 'I don't want lunch. I want breakfast.'

customblocker.name: Customer Seating
customblocker.description: Amongst the plastic debris littering the table is a Hotfishcakes breakfast. Really, wasabi AND lutefisk? TOGETHER? This is MADNESS!

customblocker.name: Customer Seating
customblocker.description: The wood has been soaked with all sorts of artificial flavourings and not-so-well-disguised stimulants Dredmor's been feeding his underlings.

customblocker.name: Sign
customblocker.description: Warning! Oil spill ahead. Proceed with caution.

customblocker.name: Sign
customblocker.description: Warning! Oil spill ahead. Proceed with caution.

customblocker.name: Moving Pictures Machine
customblocker.description: It's one of those clicky moving-pictures devices. Someday, it's going to go all horribly wrong and creatures from the Dungeon Dimensions are going to burst through, mark my words.

customblocker.name: Dredmor Audience Simulator
customblocker.description: It's a machine which laughs, claps, boos and more - all on cue and without missing a beat. The perfect audience simulator.

customblocker.name: Monitor
customblocker.description: Seems like you've stumbled upon a studio recording of 'Dread or Alive', the latest game show in which undead are quizzed for the chance of having the Reaper give them another chance at life.

customblocker.name: Monitor
customblocker.description: There's an impossibly long and frustrating calculus question here, involving the use of Bessel Equations. Apparantly, all the participants have to work with are a pencil and paper.

customblocker.name: Monitor
customblocker.description: 'Don't fear the Reaper! Will you be...DREAD! OR! ALIVE!'

customblocker.name: Contestant's Desk
customblocker.description: The buzzer on this desk is hopelessly broken.

customblocker.name: Contestant's Desk
customblocker.description: They know they have no hope of actually winning, but they still try. It's sort of sad.

customblocker.name: Contestant's Desk
customblocker.description: This desk smells distinctly of sulphur.

customblocker.name: Customer Relaxation Unit
customblocker.description: It's an open secret that souls are considerably easier to procure when the victim is unawares. But then, those who hire from the Red Lichess Society shouldn't be surprised.

customblocker.name: Customer Relaxation Unit
customblocker.description: It's an open secret that souls are considerably easier to procure when the victim is unawares. But then, those who hire from the Red Lichess Society shouldn't be surprised.

customblocker.name: Customer Relaxation Unit
customblocker.description: It's an open secret that souls are considerably easier to procure when the victim is unawares. But then, those who hire from the Red Lichess Society shouldn't be surprised.

customblocker.name: Customer Relaxation Unit
customblocker.description: It's an open secret that souls are considerably easier to procure when the victim is unawares. But then, those who hire from the Red Lichess Society shouldn't be surprised.

customblocker.name: Poster
customblocker.description: We, the ladies of the Red Lichess Society, welcome all challengers to rise to the occasion of satisfying our thirsting desires! Virile men preferred, but we certainly enjoy the company of young, nubile women, too. Fail, though, and your soul is ours to keep!

customblocker.name: Poster
customblocker.description: Founded in ages untold by Dredmor's third wife, Hagar the Horrible, the Red Lichess Society is comprised of us ladies, who willingly and freely provide social escort services for the rich and unattached. Rates range from several thousand zorkmids to your eternal soul; for more details, seek an audience with Madame Fleuret within.

customblocker.name: Wall Sconce
customblocker.description: The flames flicker welcomingly at you. Is that incense?

customblocker.name: Wall Sconce
customblocker.description: The flames flicker welcomingly at you. Is that incense?

customblocker.name: Ice Block
customblocker.description: The martial artists of the Mustache League are training their mind and body by shattering ice with their mustaches.

customblocker.name: Ice Block
customblocker.description: The martial artists of the Mustache League are training their mind and body by shattering ice with their mustaches.

customblocker.name: Stone Block
customblocker.description: The martial artists of the Mustache League are training their mind and body by shattering stone with their mustaches.

customblocker.name: Stone Block
customblocker.description: The martial artists of the Mustache League are training their mind and body by shattering stone with their mustaches.

customblocker.name: Mustache Dojo Rules
customblocker.description: 1. Respect your sensei and fellow trainees. 2. Cleanliness is a virtue our dojo should extol, sweep up shed hairs after training. 3. Refrain from training on bad hair days. 4. Be truthful to yourself. Know your limits and seek to push them further. 5. Remember why you are here. Be rigorous.

customblocker.name: Master's Manual
customblocker.description: It's an ancient manuscript describing the ultimate mustache technique, Thousand Hairs Split Ends. You wonder if you can perform this with your eyebrows.

customblocker.name: Hey!
customblocker.description: If you were amused by this, check out the Arrogant Worms and their songs! (They poke fun at everything)

customblocker.name: Fallen Vegan's Creed
customblocker.description: LISTEN UP BROTHERS AND SISTERS COME HEAR MY DESPERATE TALE I SPEAK OF OUR FRIENDS OF NATURE TRAPPED IN THE DIRT LIKE A JAIL VEGETABLES LIVE IN OPPRESSION SERVED ON OUR TABLES EACH NIGHT THIS KILLING OF VEGGIES IS MADNESS I SAY WE TAKE UP THE FIGHT

customblocker.name: Fallen Vegan's Creed
customblocker.description: SALADS ARE ONLY FOR MURDERERS COLESLAW A FASCIST REGIME DON'T THINK THAT THEY DON'T HAVE FEELINGS JUST 'CAUSE A RADISH CAN'T SCREAM

customblocker.name: Fallen Vegan's Creed
customblocker.description: I'VE HEARD THE SCREAMS OF THE VEGETABLES WATCHING THEIR SKINS BEING PEELED GRATED AND STEAMED WITH NO MERCY HOW DO YOU THINK THAT FEELS

customblocker.name: Fallen Vegan's Creed
customblocker.description: CARROT JUICE CONSTITUTES MURDER GREENHOUSES PRISONS FOR SLAVES IT'S TIME TO STOP ALL THIS GARDENING LET'S CALL A SPADE A SPADE

customblocker.name: Fallen Vegan's Creed
customblocker.description: I SAW A MAN EATING CELERY SO I BEAT HIM BLACK AND BLUE IF HE EVER TOUCHES A SPROUT AGAIN I'LL BITE HIM CLEAN IN TWO I'M A POLITICAL PRISONER TRAPPED IN A WINDOWLESS CAGE 'CAUSE I STOPPED THE SLAUGHTER OF TURNIPS BY KILLING FIVE MEN IN A RAGE

customblocker.name: Fallen Vegan's Creed
customblocker.description: I TOLD THE JUDGE WHEN HE SENTENCED ME THIS IS MY FINEST HOUR I'D KILL THOSE FARMERS AGAIN JUST TO SAVE ONE MORE CAULIFLOWER

customblocker.description: HOW LOW AS PEOPLE DO WE DARE TO STOOP MAKING YOUNG BROCCOLI BLEED IN THE SOUP UNTIE YOUR BEANS UNCAGE YOUR TOMATOES LET POTTED PLANTS FREE DON'T MASH THAT POTATO

customblocker.name: Informative Poster
customblocker.description: Every year, thousands of eyebrowed adventurers fall prey to a dreaded addiction - food. This substance comes in many forms and appears innocous enough, but unlike booze withdrawal in which sufferers can still retain some functionality, withdrawal from food is invariably fatal.

customblocker.name: Informative Poster
customblocker.description: While there are many kinds of food, symptoms of withdrawal are all the same - pain and bleeding are the amongst the first symptoms to manifest themselves. Victims may hear voices telling them to eat more food, that food is vital to their well-being. Eventually, they come to believe it. To an addict, prolonged lack of food means a slow, painful death.

customblocker.name: Informative Poster
customblocker.description: Welcome to Dredmor Academy's presentation on food addiction, a scourge that ravages our society.

customblocker.name: Informative Poster
customblocker.description: Here on exhibit are some of the most dangerous and addictive types of food, often overpriced by producers to squeeze as many zorkmids as they can out of the addicts.

customblocker.name: Informative Poster
customblocker.description: Examples of food addicts. When denied regular use of food, addicts may undergo mood swings and may turn violent. Please do not feed the addicts on display.

customblocker.name: Informative Poster
customblocker.description: A typical food addict's equipment. With this makeshift processing tool, the food addict induces chemical changes within the food in dangerous ways (usually involving fire) just so he or she can get the most enjoyment out of a limited amount of food.

customblocker.name: Sacrifice
customblocker.description: Lutefisk for the lutefisk god, but we all know where lutefisk comes from.

customblocker.name: Report
customblocker.description: Annoyance quotas for the month have been met. Any more than that is a bonus, really.

customblocker.name: Salesman's Computer
customblocker.description: The quinessential encyclopedia salesman's computer - now you know how they can call you JUST when you've sat down for dinner.

customblocker.name: Salesman's Computer
customblocker.description: This computer is gnome-approved and is programmed to play a voice recording urging people to buy gold-bound encyclopedias.

customblocker.name: Gold-Bound Encyclopedias
customblocker.description: It's where the evil encyclopedia salesmen keep their stock.

customblocker.name: Gold-Bound Encyclopedias
customblocker.description: Seems like the evil encyclopedia salesman have been keeping up their aggressive marketing tactics.

customblocker.name: Gold-Bound Encyclopedias
customblocker.description: Look at these. Thick, heavy, gaudy, and far more expensive than going out to a library or looking up stuff on the internet. Can you think of anything more worthless?

customblocker.name: Gold-Bound Encyclopedias
customblocker.description: Alligators. Ambrosia. Amoebas. Amorphia. Really, now...

customblocker.name: Schedule
customblocker.description: Thurday dinner - the Drillies. Friday lunch - the annoying kid down the dungeon level. Remember to clean hockey mask.

customblocker.name: System Map
customblocker.description: It's a map showing the various stops of the boat transit system and the expected times of arrival for the boats.

customblocker.name: Ticket Pricings
customblocker.description: It's a list of fares starting from this stop.

customblocker.name: Warning
customblocker.description: Please stay away from the edge while waiting on the platform. Dredmor transit will not be liable for any accidents arising from noncompliance with DSHA protocol.

customblocker.name: Notice Board
customblocker.description: There're all sorts of advertisments pinned to this notice board.

customblocker.name: Break Room Table
customblocker.description: Judging from the sheer number of coffee and tea rings on this table, DSHA employees sure have plenty to gripe about.

customblocker.name: Computer
customblocker.description: This computer does not forgive. It does not forget. Your safety infractions will be recorded and sent to Lord Dredmor for review; he doesn't run a world-class dungeon for nothing.

customblocker.name: Notice
customblocker.description: Beating the fax machine into submission with a heavy object is clear non-compliance with DSHA standards and will be penalised accordingly.

customblocker.name: Fax Machine
customblocker.description: It's an ancient fax machine.

customblocker.name: Safety Protocol
customblocker.description: Proper safety protocol must be observed within the break room. Vending machine incidents were responsible for 3 deaths and 16 injuries in the last quarter.

customblocker.name: Inspection Schedule
customblocker.description: It's a roster for DSHA agents to check up on health and safety on the various dungeon floors.

customblocker.name: Employee's Desk
customblocker.description: This employee has brought lunch from home. Who knows what deadly and horrifying diseases might be transmitted across dungeon levels?

customblocker.name: Employee's Desk
customblocker.description: There's a write-up on the desk concerning the liabilities diggles pose to dungeon safety.

customblocker.name: Employee's Desk
customblocker.description: From the papers on this desk, looks like Dredmor's trying to get his dungeon ESO (Evil Organisation for Standardisation) 9001 certified.

customblocker.name: Employee's Desk
customblocker.description: Seems like the boss here doesn't even trust cubicles.

customblocker.name: Employee's Desk
customblocker.description: This employee has a photo of its family on its desk, a clear violation of DSHA protocol against potentially unsafe objects.

customblocker.name: Employee's Desk
customblocker.description: Seems like violaters of DSHA protocol are sent to the evisceration chute regardless of whether they survive the initial accident or not. You have to admit it's a very efficient way of motivating dungeon employees to adopt safe working practices.

customblocker.name: Safety Records
customblocker.description: These regulations make no sense, really. Bananas aren't allowed in the dungeon because their peels pose a safety hazard, yet it's perfectly fine to bury a dwarven landmine in your frontyard. It's almost as if these regulations were...evil.

customblocker.name: Safety Records
customblocker.description: Last quarter, there were 27 fountain-related deaths in the dungeon. 14 by drinking acid, 5 by drowning, another 5 by running into and breaking something important, and another 3 that were really portals leading to a nether dimension.

customblocker.name: Safety Records
customblocker.description: Hey, you didn't know that there are over a million monster-hours worked in the dungeon every week! Or rather, were, since you've hacked and slashed your way down here...

customblocker.name: Safety Records
customblocker.description: There's a report in here on the general quality of food within the dungeon. Unsurprisingly, it's rather bad.

customblocker.name: Safety Records
customblocker.description: There's a handbook on DSHA regulations and protocol in here. It pretty much fills the whole shelf on its own.

customblocker.name: Shelf
customblocker.description: A kitchen shelf.

customblocker.name: Kitchen Counter
customblocker.description: A neat kitchen counter.

customblocker.name: Kitchen Counter
customblocker.description: A neat kitchen counter.

customblocker.name: Dining Table
customblocker.description: A table of the sort which one gathers to eat family-friendly, wholesome meals.

customblocker.name: Dining Table
customblocker.description: A table of the sort which one gathers to eat family-friendly, wholesome meals.

pedestal.name: Drinking Contest Rules
pedestal.text: Wow, you never knew diggles had this much protocol just for drinking booze.

customblocker.name: BOOOOZE
customblocker.description: YOU NEED MORE SOCIAL ACCPETANCE. DRINK MORE BOOZE. IN CONTESTS.

customblocker.name: Brew Keg
customblocker.description: A long hose connects this barrel to...well, they were recently diggles. You're not sure what these drunken monsters are now - there's nothing like drink for bringing out the devil in a man. Or diggle, for that matter.

customblocker.name: Brew Keg
customblocker.description: A long hose connects this barrel to...well, they were recently diggles. You're not sure what these drunken monsters are now - there's nothing like drink for bringing out the devil in a man. Or diggle, for that matter.

customblocker.name: Brew Keg
customblocker.description: A long hose connects this barrel to...well, they were recently diggles. You're not sure what these drunken monsters are now - there's nothing like drink for bringing out the devil in a man. Or diggle, for that matter.

customblocker.name: Bunsen Burner
customblocker.description: It's a makeshift bunsen burner.

customblocker.name: Lab Bench
customblocker.description: It's a neat and tidy lab bench.

customblocker.name: Lab Bench
customblocker.description: It's a neat and tidy lab bench.

customblocker.name: Continuous Stirred-Tank Reactor
customblocker.description: Acid's got to come from somewhere, you know.

customblocker.name: Continuous Stirred-Tank Reactor
customblocker.description: Acid's got to come from somewhere, you know.

customblocker.name: Continuous Stirred-Tank Reactor
customblocker.description: Acid's got to come from somewhere, you know.

customblocker.name: Certificate
customblocker.description: It's a certificate of proof that this site is DSHA-compliant.

customblocker.name: Notice
customblocker.description: Remember to clean up before the safety inspectors come today. And no sweeping the skeletons under the walls!

customblocker.name: Emergency Procedures
customblocker.description: In case of accident, pull lever to engage emergency shower. Remember to turn it off once you're done!

customblocker.name: Acid-Eaten Skeleton
customblocker.description: Well, well well. You've heard of skeletons in the closet, but this is ridiculous.

customblocker.name: Acid-Eaten Skeleton
customblocker.description: You've heard that this is pretty much the only way to get rid of serial killers.

customblocker.name: Acid-Eaten Skeleton
customblocker.description: An unlucky lab assistant.

customengraving.description: A cupboard for holding alchemy components.

customblocker.name: Product Warranty
customblocker.description: Digglematic puke pool 3000: for when you can't take it anymore. Vomiting made easy!

customblocker.name: Notice
customblocker.description: Diggle Frat House: blood alcohol experiment currently underway. Do not disturb.

customblocker.name: Brew Keg
customblocker.description: A long hose connects this barrel to...well, they were recently diggles. You're not sure what these drunken monsters are now - there's nothing like drink for bringing out the devil in a man. Or diggle, for that matter.
